examples.english: They didn't even have enough money to buy food.
examples.chinese: 他们甚至没有足够的钱购买食物。

examples.english: The church program provides food and clothing for the needy.
examples.chinese: 这项教会计划为穷人提供食物和衣服。

examples.english: Juntao refused food as a protest against prison conditions.
examples.chinese: 俊涛拒绝进食以抗议恶劣的监狱条件。

examples.english: You should have something to eat before you go out.
examples.chinese: 你出门前应该吃点东西。

examples.english: I'm not hungry -- I had something to eat earlier.
examples.chinese: 我不饿，我前些时候吃了些东西。

examples.english: Do you want me to fix you something to eat?
examples.chinese: 你要不要我给你弄点吃的？

examples.english: Where's the grub? I'm starving.
examples.chinese: 吃的东西放在哪里？我饿死了。

examples.english: There was plenty of nosh at the party.
examples.chinese: 聚会上有很多吃的东西。

examples.english: The doctor told him to reduce the amount of fat in his diet.
examples.chinese: 医生告诉他要减少饮食中的脂肪含量。

examples.english: 150,000 Californians die each year from diseases related to a poor diet.
examples.chinese: 每年有15万加州人死于与不良饮食有关的疾病。

examples.english: The secret to a longer life is a balanced diet and regular exercise.
examples.chinese: 长寿的秘诀就是均衡的饮食和经常锻炼身体。

examples.english: a low-fat diet rich in fruits and vegetables
examples.chinese: 包括大量水果和蔬菜的低脂肪饮食

examples.english: People in the coastal region live on a staple diet of rice and fish.
examples.chinese: 沿海地区的人以大米和鱼为主食。

examples.english: For 27 years in the jungles of Guam, Yokoi survived on a diet of shrimp, coconuts, snails, frogs and rats.
examples.chinese: 在关岛的27年丛林生活中，横井靠吃虾、椰子、蜗牛、青蛙和老鼠为生。

examples.english: Mrs Thompson has kindly offered to provide the refreshments for the school sports day.
examples.chinese: 汤普森夫人慷慨地提出校运会那天由她提供茶点。

examples.english: Light refreshments will be served during the interval.
examples.chinese: 幕间休息时有小茶点供应。

examples.english: A growing child needs proper nourishment.
examples.chinese: 正在发育的孩子需要适当的营养。

examples.english: Calves rely on their mother's milk to provide nourishment.
examples.chinese: 牛犊靠母牛的牛奶提供营养。

examples.english: The foetus gets nourishment via the mother's blood supply.
examples.chinese: 胎儿从母体的血液供应吸取营养。

centers.english: a particular kind of food, or food that has been cooked in a particular way
centers.chinese: 某种特定的食物，或以特定方式烹煮的食物

examples.english: The doctor told him not to eat fatty foods.
examples.chinese: 医生告诉他不能吃脂肪多的食物。

examples.english: Do you like spicy food?
examples.chinese: 你喜欢辛辣的食物吗？

examples.english: I've never had Indonesian food -- what's it like?
examples.chinese: 我从未尝过印尼食物，是什么样的?

examples.english: the world's largest fast food restaurant chain
examples.chinese: 世界上规模最大的连锁快餐店

examples.english: You shouldn't eat all that junk food, it's bad for you.
examples.chinese: 你不应吃那些垃圾食品，对身体不好。

examples.english: A health food store is a good place to look for herbs.
examples.chinese: 健康食品店里该买得到药草。

examples.english: You can quite easily make your own baby food at home.
examples.chinese: 在家里自己做婴儿食物很方便。

examples.english: This dish can be served hot or cold.
examples.chinese: 这道菜热吃冷吃都可以。

examples.english: a delicious vegetable dish with a spicy nut sauce
examples.chinese: 一道美味的拌有辛辣坚果酱的蔬菜

examples.english: We serve a variety of Thai dishes.
examples.chinese: 我们供应各式各样的泰式菜肴。

examples.english: The village is famous for its seafood specialties.
examples.chinese: 这个村子以海鲜特色菜闻名。

examples.english: Fish curry is a local speciality
examples.chinese: 咖喱鱼是一道地方特色菜。

examples.english: Squid is a delicacy in this part of Italy.
examples.chinese: 在意大利的这个地区，鱿鱼是一种美食。

examples.english: Hasan plied us with drinks and an array of Egyptian delicacies which he brought from the kitchen.
examples.chinese: 哈桑不断给我们斟酒，不断从厨房端来许多埃及美味。

examples.english: The Elephant and Castle is known for its traditional English fare.
examples.chinese: “大象与城堡”餐馆以其传统的英式菜肴闻名。

examples.english: Children will be thrilled to find such simple fare as macaroni and cheese on the menu.
examples.chinese: 孩子们在菜单上看到像意大利通心面和干酪这样简单的食品会很兴奋的。

examples.english: New-born birds stay in their nest while their mother goes out in search of food.
examples.chinese: 刚出生的小鸟留在巢里，而它们的母亲则出去觅食。

examples.english: Make sure you leave the cat plenty of food and water before you go.
examples.chinese: 你外出前要确保给猫准备下许多食物和水。

examples.english: Buddy won't eat the new dog food I bought.
examples.chinese: 巴迪不肯吃我买的新狗粮。

examples.english: All the left-over crops are chopped up and used as cattle fodder.
examples.chinese: 所有剩余的庄稼都被剁碎，用作喂牛的饲料。

examples.english: Beet tops were left on the ground as fodder for a small flock of sheep.
examples.chinese: 甜菜叶子留在地上给一小群羊当饲料。

examples.english: A large part of our income goes on animal feed.
examples.chinese: 我们收入的很大一部分都用来买牲口饲料了。

centers.english: to give food to a person or animal

examples.english: My sister feeds the cats when we are away.
examples.chinese: 我们外出时由我妹妹喂猫。

examples.english: How often do you have to feed the baby?
examples.chinese: 你隔多少时间得喂一次婴儿?

examples.english: They hardly earn enough to feed their children.
examples.chinese: 他们挣的钱几乎喂不饱自己的孩子。

examples.english: The catering service feeds over 600 employees every day.
examples.chinese: 伙食承包服务每天供应600多名员工的用餐。

examples.english: The horses were fed on hay and grain.
examples.chinese: 这些马喂以干草和谷物。

examples.english: When I was young, my grandmother was always trying to feed me up with sweets and biscuits.
examples.chinese: 我小时候祖母总是给我吃许多糖果和饼干。

examples.english: We'll have to start feeding up the turkey for Thanksgiving soon.
examples.chinese: 我们很快就得开始把火鸡喂肥好过感恩节。

examples.english: Dinner will be served at eight o'clock.
examples.chinese: 8点钟供应晚餐。

examples.english: The chef serves important guests himself.
examples.chinese: 厨师亲自为重要客人上菜。

examples.english: We sat around for forty-five minutes, waiting to be served.
examples.chinese: 我们坐在那里等上菜等了45分钟。

examples.english: They served us with soup and bread.
examples.chinese: 他们为我们端来了汤和面包。

examples.english: Andrew, will you serve coffee to the visitors?
examples.chinese: 安德鲁，你去给客人倒咖啡行吗？

examples.english: At dinner, Mrs. Carothers served up poached salmon and filled our glasses with white wine.
examples.chinese: 晚餐时卡罗瑟斯太太端上水煮鲑鱼，并给我们的杯子斟满了白葡萄酒。

centers.english: an amount of food that someone is given or that someone eats
centers.chinese: 某人得到的或吃下的食物量

examples.english: My mother always gave the boys bigger portions than she gave me.
examples.chinese: 我妈妈给男孩子的食物分量总是比给我的要多。

examples.english: Two portions of French fries please.
examples.chinese: 请来两份炸薯条。

examples.english: He held out his bowl for another helping.
examples.chinese: 他举起碗要再来一份。

examples.english: Anyone want a second helping?
examples.chinese: 有人要再来一份吗？

examples.english: She took another helping of pie when she thought no one was looking.
examples.chinese: 她认为没人看见，就再拿了一份馅饼。

examples.english: They had turkey and stuffing topped off with large helpings of mashed potatoes.
examples.chinese: 他们吃了火鸡和填料，上面还有大份的土豆泥。

examples.english: This recipe makes enough minestrone soup for four to six servings.
examples.chinese: 照这菜谱做的意大利蔬菜浓汤够四至六人吃。

examples.english: The dish has about 250 calories per serving.
examples.chinese: 这道菜每一份约含250卡路里。

centers.english: food that makes your stomach feel full

examples.english: I'll only give you a small amount of rice because it's quite filling.
examples.chinese: 我只给你少量的米饭，因为很容易吃饱。

examples.english: Of course I like your chocolate cake, but it's so filling I couldn't possibly eat another piece.
examples.chinese: 我当然喜欢吃你的巧克力蛋糕，不过这种蛋糕太容易饱，我怎么也吃不下第二块了。

examples.english: Stress, lack of rest and too much stodgy food had made Pauline break out in spots.
examples.chinese: 压力大、缺乏休息和吃太多的油腻食物使保利娜长粉刺了。

examples.english: The food in Suzie's Café tends to be stodgy rather than fresh and light.
examples.chinese: 苏茜小餐馆的食物大都油腻不易消化，而不是新鲜清淡的。

examples.english: Some people find wholemeal bread too heavy.
examples.chinese: 有些人觉得粗麦粉面包太难消化。

examples.english: Try to avoid heavy meals late in the evening.
examples.chinese: 夜晚时别吃得太饱。

examples.english: You mustn't eat too much rich food - it's bad for you.
examples.chinese: 你不可以吃太多的油腻食品，对你的健康不利。

examples.english: The meat was browned to perfection and topped with a rich sauce.
examples.chinese: 肉煎得颜色正好，还浇上了浓浓的酱汁。

examples.english: Drink your coffee before it gets cold.
examples.chinese: 趁咖啡还热喝了它吧。！

examples.english: Is this water safe to drink?
examples.chinese: 这水能喝吗？

examples.english: He was drinking vodka straight from the bottle.
examples.chinese: 他直接用酒瓶喝伏特加。

examples.english: She picked up the cup and began to drink thirstily.
examples.chinese: 她拿起杯子匆匆地喝了起来。

examples.english: We always have tea in the morning.
examples.chinese: 我们早上总是喝茶。

examples.english: Robin was driving, so he just had a glass of orange juice.
examples.chinese: 罗宾在开车，所以他只喝了杯橙汁。

examples.english: We had a couple of beers and talked about old times.
examples.chinese: 我们喝了几杯啤酒，谈论着过去的时光。

examples.english: Can I have a drink of water, please?
examples.chinese: 给我喝杯水好吗？

examples.english: Sit down and have a drink.
examples.chinese: 坐下来喝一杯。

examples.english: He was very weak, but managed to take a mouthful of water from my bottle.
examples.chinese: 他极度虚弱，费力地从我的瓶子里喝了一口水。

examples.english: Jody took another sip of wine.
examples.chinese: 乔迪又喝了一口酒。

examples.english: Sue sat at the bar sipping a Martini.
examples.chinese: 休坐在酒吧里呷着马提尼酒。

examples.english: She sipped water all the way through the interview.
examples.chinese: 接受采访的过程中她一直在小口小口地喝水。

examples.english: Can I just try a sip, to see if I like it.
examples.chinese: 我喝一小口吧，这样就知道是否喜欢喝了。

examples.english: Jenny cautiously took a couple of sips of the liquid.
examples.chinese: 珍妮小心翼翼地呷了几口那种液体。

examples.english: We stopped in a small village to quench our thirst and refuel the jeep.
examples.chinese: 我们在一个小村庄里停下来喝水解渴，并给吉普车加油。

examples.english: Ice-cool, thirst-quenching beers on sale here!
examples.chinese: 这儿有冰凉解渴的啤酒卖啦！

examples.english: He bent his face over the steaming bowl and slurped loudly.
examples.chinese: 他脸朝下凑着冒热气的碗大声地喝了起来。

examples.english: The old man started to slurp his beer.
examples.chinese: 那老人开始咕嘟咕嘟地喝起了啤酒。

examples.english: We spotted the cubs lapping water from a stream in the forest.
examples.chinese: 我们看到那些幼兽在林中小溪边舐水。

examples.english: The tiny creature started to lap the milk up eagerly.
examples.chinese: 这小动物开始急切地舔牛奶。

examples.english: A large dog lapped up the gravy that had spilt on the floor.
examples.chinese: 一条大狗舔着洒落在地上的肉汁。

examples.english: I gulped down my tea and dashed out of the house.
examples.chinese: 我大口喝完茶便冲出屋子。

examples.english: Rodney gulped his wine nervously.
examples.chinese: 罗德尼紧张不安地大口喝下了那杯酒。

examples.english: Manny gulped his beer down and followed me.
examples.chinese: 曼尼把啤酒一饮而尽，然后跟着我一起走。

examples.english: She finished the drink in a single gulp.
examples.chinese: 她把饮料一饮而尽。

examples.english: The soldiers took it in turns to swig vodka.
examples.chinese: 那些士兵轮流大口大口地喝伏特加酒。

examples.english: Jack swigged the last of his tea and got up to leave.
examples.chinese: 杰克把剩下的茶一口喝掉就起身离开了。

examples.english: The old man wandered along, swigging occasionally from a whiskey bottle.
examples.chinese: 那老汉在闲逛着，偶尔从瓶子里喝一大口威士忌。

examples.english: He took a swig of brandy from a small metal flask.
examples.chinese: 他从一只小金属扁酒瓶里喝了一大口白兰地。

examples.english: Come on, drink up. I want to go home.
examples.chinese: 快点喝完，我要回家了。

examples.english: Come on, drink your milk up.
examples.chinese: 快，把牛奶喝掉。

examples.english: She drank up her brandy and signalled to the waiter to bring another.
examples.chinese: 她喝光了白兰地，然后示意服务员再给她拿一杯。

examples.english: Two bored-looking businessmen were knocking back glasses of schnapps.
examples.chinese: 两个一脸厌烦的商人一杯杯地喝下大量荷兰烈酒。

examples.english: He knocked back the last of the bourbon, then lit his last cigarette.
examples.chinese: 他喝完最后一杯波旁威士忌酒，然后点燃他最后一支香烟。

examples.english: When his whisky arrived, he knocked it back in a single gulp.
examples.chinese: 他点的威士忌酒送上来后，他一口就把它喝了。

examples.english: The servant brought a glass of water, which I downed in a single mouthful.
examples.chinese: 仆人拿来一杯水，我一口把它喝完了。

examples.english: After downing a whole bottle of tequila, she swallowed several dozen sleeping tablets.
examples.chinese: 她喝下一整瓶龙舌兰酒后，又吃了几十片安眠药。

examples.english: Jim drained his glass then offered to buy everyone another one.
examples.chinese: 吉姆喝完自己的一杯后，提出由他请客给每人都再来一杯。

examples.english: Hurriedly draining her cup, she reached for her purse.
examples.chinese: 她急急地喝下一杯就去拿钱包。

examples.english: I think I'll polish that last beer off before George gets in.
examples.chinese: 我想我要赶在乔治进来之前把最后的一点啤酒喝完。

examples.english: Did you polish off all the wine last night?
examples.chinese: 你昨晚把酒都喝光了吗？

examples.english: ‘Would you like a drink?’ ‘Yes, I'll have a lemonade please.’
examples.chinese: “你想来一杯饮料吗？”“好，请来杯柠檬水。”

examples.english: a nice cool drink
examples.chinese: 可口冰凉的饮料

examples.english: She tipped her drink over his head and stormed out.
examples.chinese: 她把饮料往他头上一倒，就气愤地冲了出去。

examples.english: Give the children a drink of milk and something to eat.
examples.chinese: 给孩子们喝杯牛奶，吃点东西。

examples.english: You can bring your own food and drink to the picnic.
examples.chinese: 你可以自带食物和饮料去野餐。

examples.english: It's under $10 for lunch and drinks at the Ivy Bush.
examples.chinese: 在“常青藤灌木”餐厅用餐加饮料一起不超过10美元。

examples.english: I'm really thirsty. Let's stop for something to drink.
examples.chinese: 我渴极了，我们停下来喝点东西吧。

examples.english: Can I get you something to drink?
examples.chinese: 要不要我给你弄点喝的？

examples.english: Non-alcoholic beverages will be on sale in the foyer.
examples.chinese: 不含酒精饮料将在休息厅内有售。

centers.english: drinks that contain gas or do not contain gas
centers.chinese: 含气泡或不含气泡的饮料

examples.english: fizzy lemonade
examples.chinese: 柠檬汽水

examples.english: I don't like fizzy drinks much.
examples.chinese: 我不太喜欢有气饮料。

examples.english: I'd like a glass of carbonated mineral water, please.
examples.chinese: 请给我来杯有气矿泉水。

examples.english: a sweet, sparkling wine
examples.chinese: 一杯甜葡萄气酒

examples.english: a bottle of sparkling mineral water
examples.chinese: 一瓶冒气泡的矿泉水

examples.english: Would you like that still or sparkling, madam?
examples.chinese: 太太，你要不起泡的还是起泡的？

examples.english: I don't know why some English people prefer flat beer.
examples.chinese: 我弄不懂为什么有些英格兰人爱喝走了气的啤酒。

examples.english: That champagne must have gone flat by now.
examples.chinese: 那瓶香槟酒现在肯定已经走气了。

examples.english: We're not allowed to serve alcohol to people under 18.
examples.chinese: 我们不可以卖酒给18岁以下人士。

examples.english: low-alcohol wines not containing a lot of alcohol
examples.chinese: 酒精含量低的酒

examples.english: He doesn't drink alcohol or smoke.
examples.chinese: 他不喝酒，不抽烟。

examples.english: She could smell alcohol on his breath.
examples.chinese: 她从他的呼吸中可闻出酒精味。

examples.english: You can't sell alcoholic drinks unless you have a licence.
examples.chinese: 除非你持有牌照，否则不可以出售含酒精饮料。

examples.english: ‘Can I get you a drink?’ ‘I'll have a gin and tonic, please.’
examples.chinese: “给你来杯酒好吗？”“我要一杯杜松子酒加奎宁水。”

examples.english: After a few drinks, Rick began to feel better.
examples.chinese: 几杯酒下肚，里克开始感到好些了。

examples.english: They've always got loads of drink in the house.
examples.chinese: 他们家里总有很多酒。

examples.english: Do you feel like going out for a drink tonight?
examples.chinese: 今晚你想出去喝一杯吗？

examples.english: They all went for a drink together after the film.
examples.chinese: 他们看完电影后一起去喝酒了。

examples.english: The man was holding a bottle of liquor in one hand and a cigarette in the other.
examples.chinese: 那男人一手握着瓶酒，另一只手中夹着根烟。

examples.english: a liquor store
examples.chinese: 出售酒类的商店

examples.english: He got used to drinking hard liquor at an early age.
examples.chinese: 他很小就习惯喝烈性酒了。

examples.english: The doctor told Jimmy to stay off the booze for a while.
examples.chinese: 医生叫吉米戒一阵子酒。

examples.english: The prince is known for his love of women, gambling, and booze.
examples.chinese: 人所周知那位王子热衷于女人、赌博和喝酒。

centers.english: drinks that do not contain alcohol

examples.english: Do you want a beer, or would you prefer a soft drink?
examples.chinese: 你要啤酒还是喜欢软饮料？

examples.english: a soft drinks manufacturer
examples.chinese: 软饮料生产商

examples.english: We got some non-alcoholic wine for Lisa because she doesn't drink.
examples.chinese: 我们给莉萨喝的是不含酒精的葡萄酒，因为她不喝酒的。

examples.english: non-alcoholic beer
examples.chinese: 不含酒精的啤酒

examples.english: There is a growing market for low-alcohol beers.
examples.chinese: 酒精含量低的啤酒市场越来越大了。

examples.english: There's quite a variety of low-alcohol drinks available now.
examples.chinese: 现在可以买到种类繁多的低度酒。

examples.english: We had a few drinks to celebrate.
examples.chinese: 为了庆祝我们喝了几杯酒。

examples.english: You can't have a drink if you're driving Mary home.
examples.chinese: 你要开车送玛莉回家就不能喝酒了。

examples.english: Cliff wanted us all to go and have a drink after the show.
examples.chinese: 克利夫要我们在演出结束后都去喝一杯。

examples.english: He's been depressed, and drinking a lot more recently.
examples.chinese: 他感到压抑，近来一直在酗酒。

examples.english: Did you drink a lot over Christmas?
examples.chinese: 你圣诞节喝了许多酒吗?

examples.english: It was obvious that Jimmy had been drinking.
examples.chinese: 很明显吉米一直在酗酒。

examples.english: I think people who drink and drive should be banned from driving permanently.
examples.chinese: 我认为那些酒后驾驶的人应该被永远禁止驾车。

examples.english: It was clear that Malone had been drinking heavily.
examples.chinese: 显而易见马隆一直在酗酒。

examples.english: She's been drinking more heavily recently.
examples.chinese: 近来她酗酒更厉害了。

examples.english: My uncle drinks like a fish, and has done for years.
examples.chinese: 我叔叔经常狂饮，许多年来一直这样。

examples.english: His family life is beginning to be affected by his drinking.
examples.chinese: 他的家庭生活因他酗酒而开始受到了影响。

examples.english: We went out drinking last night.
examples.chinese: 昨晚我们出去喝酒了。

examples.english: I'll have orange juice please. I don't drink.
examples.chinese: 请给我来一杯橙汁，我不喝酒。

examples.english: Ben is the only one of my friends who doesn't drink.
examples.chinese: 本是我朋友中唯一一个不喝酒的人。

examples.english: He's recently become a strict teetotaller.
examples.chinese: 他最近变得滴酒不沾。!

examples.english: We're not teetotalers, but we recommend sensible drinking limits.
examples.chinese: 我们虽然算不上滴酒不沾，但我们主张喝酒要有理性的节制。

examples.english: He's a teetotal, non-smoking vegetarian yoga teacher.
examples.chinese: 他是个烟酒不沾、吃素食的瑜珈教练。

examples.english: I used to drink a bottle of whisky a week but I never touch it these days.
examples.chinese: 我以前一个星期喝一瓶威士忌，但现在滴酒不沾。

examples.english: ‘Rick hasn't touched a drop in years,’ said Mrs Marsden proudly.
examples.chinese: “里克已经很多年不沾酒了。”马斯登夫人自豪地说。

examples.english: Sam's been told that unless he stops drinking, he could be dead within a year.
examples.chinese: 萨姆已经得知，除非他马上戒酒，否则活不过一年。

examples.english: I didn't realize I had a problem until I tried to give up drinking but couldn't.
examples.chinese: 一直到我想戒酒却戒不掉时，我才意识到自己出了问题。

examples.english: Do you want a beer, Harry, or are you still on the wagon?
examples.chinese: 你要喝一杯啤酒吗，哈里，还是仍在戒酒?

examples.english: I thought you were on the wagon!
examples.chinese: 我还以为你戒酒了呢！

centers.english: what people say when they drink alcohol together
centers.chinese: 人们一起喝酒时说的话

examples.english: They all clinked glasses and said ‘Cheers!’
examples.chinese: 他们一起碰杯说：“干杯！

examples.english: Here's to Clare and Malcolm! May they have a long and happy marriage!
examples.chinese: 为克莱尔和马尔科姆干杯！祝愿他俩的婚姻天长地久，幸福美满！

examples.english: Don't eat so fast - you'll get sick.
examples.chinese: 别吃得这么快—会不舒服的。

examples.english: I'm so full. I couldn't eat another thing.
examples.chinese: 我很饱了，再也吃不下了。

examples.english: She was sitting on the wall, eating an apple.
examples.chinese: 她坐在墙上吃着苹果。

examples.english: Hey! - Someone's eaten all my chocolates.
examples.chinese: 嗨！一有人把我的巧克力全吃光了。

examples.english: I wasn't very hungry, so I just had a sandwich.
examples.chinese: 我不是很饿，所以只吃了份三明治。

examples.english: I think I'll just have one more piece of cake.
examples.chinese: 我想，我再吃一块蛋糕吧。

examples.english: What shall we have for dinner?
examples.chinese: 我们晚饭吃什么?

examples.english: I usually just have fruit for breakfast.
examples.chinese: 我一般只吃水果当早餐。

examples.english: I chewed the toffee slowly.
examples.chinese: 我慢慢地嚼着太妃糖。

examples.english: There was a cow in the field, slowly chewing a mouthful of grass.
examples.chinese: 田里有头奶牛在慢慢地嚼着一嘴的草。

examples.english: If you drink some water it will make the pills easier to swallow.
examples.chinese: 喝点水，药片就更容易咽下去。

examples.english: I threw a piece of meat to the dog and he swallowed it in one go.
examples.chinese: 我给那狗扔了一块肉，它一口就吞了下去。

examples.english: The children sat licking their ice creams.
examples.chinese: 孩子们坐着舔着冰淇淋。

examples.english: Nina licked the melted chocolate off her fingers.
examples.chinese: 尼娜舔去手指上融化了的巧克力。

examples.english: In order to survive human beings need to consume food and water.
examples.chinese: 人类生存需要吃东西、喝水。

examples.english: People who consume large amounts of animal fats are more likely to get cancer and heart disease.
examples.chinese: 大量食用动物脂肪的人更有可能患上癌症和心脏病。

examples.english: Food products have dates printed on them to show if they're safe for consumption safe to be consumed.
examples.chinese: 食品上都印有表示安全食用的日期。

examples.english: Dinner's ready everyone. Dig in!
examples.chinese: 晚餐准备好了。大家痛快地吃吧！

examples.english: Nick was already at the table, tucking in.
examples.chinese: 尼克已经坐在桌子旁大吃起来了。

examples.english: ‘This is delicious!’ he said, tucking into his steak and kidney pudding.
examples.chinese: “味道真好！”他边说边大口大口地吃着牛排腰子布丁。

examples.english: Most new babies will want to feed every few hours.
examples.chinese: 大部分新生儿每隔几小时就需喂哺一次。

examples.english: The pigs were feeding from a trough in the middle of the yard.
examples.chinese: 猪从院子中央的饲料槽内吃东西。

examples.english: The larvae feed on the young shoots of water-lilies.
examples.chinese: 幼虫吃睡莲的新芽。

examples.english: We each grabbed a container of ice cream and chowed down.
examples.chinese: 我们每人抓了一盒冰淇淋大吃起来。

examples.english: The kids were chowing down on a large pizza.
examples.chinese: 孩子们正在狼吞虎咽地吃着一大块比萨饼。

examples.english: Have you had lunch?
examples.chinese: 你吃过午饭了吗?

examples.english: Make sure you have a good breakfast because lunch isn't until two o'clock.
examples.chinese: 早餐一定要好好吃一顿，因为午饭要等到两点钟才吃。

examples.english: We had an excellent meal in a Thai restaurant.
examples.chinese: 我们在一家泰国餐馆美美地吃了一顿。

examples.english: We usually eat at seven o'clock.
examples.chinese: 我们一般7点钟吃饭。

examples.english: I'm not hungry, thanks - I've already eaten.
examples.chinese: 我不饿，谢谢一我已经吃过了。

examples.english: We eat out about once a month.
examples.chinese: 我们大约一个月出去吃一次饭。

examples.english: We ate dinner at around six, then went out.
examples.chinese: 我们6点钟左右吃了晚饭就出去了。

examples.english: Shall we stop here and have something to eat?
examples.chinese: 我们在这儿停停吃点东西好吗？

examples.english: Halfway to Berlin we stopped to have something to eat.
examples.chinese: 我们在去柏林的中途停下来吃了些东西。

examples.english: The movie didn't start for another hour, so we had something to eat in the cafe across the street.
examples.chinese: 电影还要过一小时才开始，于是我们在街对面的咖啡馆里吃了点东西。

examples.english: Let's grab something to eat before we go out.
examples.chinese: 我们出去以前赶紧吃些东西吧。

examples.english: Do you want to grab a bite to eat, or can you wait until we get home?
examples.chinese: 你要随便吃点东西，还是能等到我们回到家再吃？

examples.english: I usually have a snack at about 3 o'clock.
examples.chinese: 我通常在3点钟左右吃点小吃。

examples.english: Dinner wouldn't be ready for a couple hours, so we had a snack while we watched television.
examples.chinese: 晚饭还要几个小时才准备好，所以我们边看电视边吃了点东西。

examples.english: They stopped for a snack at a roadside cafe.
examples.chinese: 他们在路边的一家咖啡馆停下来吃了点东西。

examples.english: Children who snack often develop poor eating habits.
examples.chinese: 常吃零食的孩子会养成不良的饮食习惯。

examples.english: Tim was always snacking on potato chips and popcorn.
examples.chinese: 蒂姆总是把薯条和爆米花当零食吃。

examples.english: I have received an invitation to dine with the Mayor.
examples.chinese: 我已接到邀请，与市长一同进餐。

examples.english: Dining alone this evening?
examples.chinese: 今晚一个人用餐吗?

examples.english: Guests dined on sea bass and saffron potato mousseline.
examples.chinese: 客人正餐吃的是海鲈和藏红花马铃薯荷兰调味汁。

examples.english: It's a place where the famous can dine out and not be bothered.
examples.chinese: 在这个地方，名人出来用餐不会受到打扰。

centers.english: to eat a lot or too much

examples.english: Having stuffed himself with burgers, Terry was unable to finish his dessert.
examples.chinese: 特里吃汉堡包吃得太饱，甜点就吃不完了。

examples.english: The Romans would gorge themselves on grapes and plums.
examples.chinese: 古罗马人吃很多葡萄和李子。

examples.english: Last night we pigged out and ate three pizzas.
examples.chinese: 昨晚我们埋头大吃，吃了三块比萨饼。

examples.english: When he's depressed he always pigs out on ice cream.
examples.chinese: 他情绪低落的时候总是拼命吃冰淇淋。

examples.english: I had four pieces of cake and made a real pig of myself.
examples.chinese: 我吃了四块蛋糕，吃得像猪一样。

examples.english: Don't make such a pig of yourself; you've eaten enough.
examples.chinese: 别弄得像猪一样的，你已吃得够多了。

examples.english: You need to watch your weight - have you been overeating?
examples.chinese: 你要注意体重了——是不是吃得太多了?

examples.english: A woman who overeats during pregnancy can cause health problems for her child.
examples.chinese: 孕妇在怀孕期内吃得过多可能给孩子造成健康问题。

examples.english: We're constantly being reminded of the dangers of overeating.
examples.chinese: 我们经常被提醒要注意饮食过量的危险性。

examples.english: I wolfed down my breakfast but still felt hungry.
examples.chinese: 我狼吞虎咽地把早餐吃完，可还是觉得饿。

examples.english: They were already late so they wolfed down their lunch and caught the 2.30 train.
examples.chinese: 他们已经迟了，所以就狼吞虎咽地吃完午餐赶上了2：30的火车。

examples.english: When the food finally came she wolfed it down immediately.
examples.chinese: 食物终于送上来了，她一下子就把它吃掉了。

examples.english: He bolted down two hamburgers then washed them down with Coca-Cola.
examples.chinese: 他三口两口就吃掉了两个汉堡包，然后喝可口可乐把食物顺了下去。

examples.english: Don't bolt your food down! Chew it up slowly.
examples.chinese: 吃东西别狼吞虎咽！要细嚼慢咽。

examples.english: Mike gobbled his lunch down then dashed off to meet his next client.
examples.chinese: 迈克三下两下吃完午餐，然后赶紧去见下一位客户。

examples.english: The cat leapt onto the kitchen counter and gobbled up the smoked salmon intended for dinner.
examples.chinese: 那只猫跳上厨房的料理台，把原本备作晚餐的烟熏三文鱼吃了个精光。

examples.english: I left three pies in the fridge and someone's scoffed the lot!
examples.chinese: 我在冰箱里放了三块馅饼，有人把它们全吃光了！

examples.english: I scarfed down breakfast in my car on the way to work.
examples.chinese: 上班路上我就在车上狼吞虎咽吃了早餐。

examples.english: Wow, you two really scarfed those cookies up.
examples.chinese: 哇，你们俩真的把这些曲奇饼都吃掉了。

examples.english: Jamie came out of the store munching a bag of potato chips.
examples.chinese: 杰米从店里出来，嘎巴嘎巴地吃着一袋薯片。

examples.english: We sipped black coffee and munched on homemade biscuits.
examples.chinese: 我们呷着黑咖啡，大嚼着家里自制的饼干。

examples.english: He drank his orange juice and crunched a half burnt piece of toast.
examples.chinese: 他喝着橙汁，嚼着一片烤得半焦的吐司。

examples.english: Jill was reading the paper, crunching a raw carrot as she read.
examples.chinese: 吉尔一边看报纸，一边嘎吱嘎吱地嚼着一根生胡萝卜。

examples.english: Miguel, crunching on a mouthful of chips, wiped the cheese from his beard.
examples.chinese: 米格尔一边嚼着一嘴的炸薯片，一边拭去胡子上的干酪。

examples.english: Come on, boys -- eat up your supper and get to bed.
examples.chinese: 孩子们，快点一吃完晚饭上床睡觉。

examples.english: Margaret ate it all up and then asked for more.
examples.chinese: 玛格丽特吃完以后又要了一些。

examples.english: We were always taught to eat our vegetables up.
examples.chinese: 人们总是教我们要把蔬菜吃光。

examples.english: Are you finished?
examples.chinese: 你吃完了吗?

examples.english: You may not leave the table until you've finished your supper.
examples.chinese: 你吃完了晚饭才可以离开桌子。

examples.english: I finished my lunch, repacked my back pack, and set off again.
examples.chinese: 我吃完午饭，重新收拾好背包再次出发。

examples.english: Hurry up and finish so we can make the 7 o'clock show.
examples.chinese: 赶紧吃完，这样我们就可以赶上7点钟的演出。

examples.english: Who finished off the cake that was left after the party?
examples.chinese: 谁把聚会剩下来的蛋糕吃掉了?

examples.english: Can someone finish up these strawberries so I don't have to throw them away?
examples.chinese: 有没有人能把这些草莓吃掉省得我扔掉？

examples.english: Finish those carrots off and you can have dessert.
examples.chinese: 吃掉那些胡萝卜，然后你可以吃些甜点。

examples.english: At dinner he polished off six fudge brownies and then asked for some more.
examples.chinese: 吃饭时，他一口气吃掉了六块乳脂巧克力蛋糕，后来又要了几块。

examples.english: If anyone wants more pizza, come and get it before Dan polishes it all off.
examples.chinese: 如果有人想吃多一点比萨饼，赶快来拿，不然丹就要把它全吃完了。

examples.english: The kids demolished the cake and then ran back outside to play.
examples.chinese: 孩子们吃光了蛋糕又跑出去玩了。

examples.english: I've seen Marian demolish a big box of chocolates in one sitting!
examples.chinese: 我看到过玛丽安一口气就吞掉了一大盒巧克力！

examples.english: After the tennis match the boys devoured the sandwiches in seconds.
examples.chinese: 网球比赛结束之后，这些男孩子狼吞虎咽，不一会就把三明治吃光了。

examples.english: Wendell devoured a large piece of gingerbread, then licked his fingers greedily.
examples.chinese: 温德尔囫囵吞吃了一大块姜饼，然后还馋嘴地舔着手指。

centers.english: to eat small amounts of food

examples.english: The horse lowered his head and began to nibble the grass.
examples.chinese: 那匹马低头啃起草来。

examples.english: We stood around drinking wine and nibbling on little snacks.
examples.chinese: 我们闲站着，喝葡萄酒，吃点零食。

examples.english: I sat picking at my dinner, wishing I were somewhere else.
examples.chinese: 我坐在那里毫无胃口地吃着饭，心里想着要是我不在这里就好了。

examples.english: Are you feeling okay? You've hardly touched your dinner.
examples.chinese: 你没事吧？晚饭你几乎碰都没碰。

examples.english: We were so full by the time dessert came that we hardly touched it.
examples.chinese: 上甜点时我们都很饱了，所以几乎碰都没碰。

centers.english: to eat less in order to lose weight

examples.english: I've been dieting for two months and I've lost 6 kilos.
examples.chinese: 我已节食两个月，体重减了6公斤。

examples.english: She dieted and went on exercise programs but nothing seemed to work.
examples.chinese: 她又是节食，又是参加健身计划，但好像都不起作用。

examples.english: I've tried all the diets and they never work.
examples.chinese: 我试过各种各样的节食方法，但从来都没用。

examples.english: This new diet involves eating very small amounts throughout the day.
examples.chinese: 这一新的减肥方法要求一整天只吃很少的东西。

examples.english: The doctor told Tom to quit smoking and go on a diet.
examples.chinese: 医生叫汤姆戒烟，并控制饮食。

examples.english: Since his heart attack, Brice has been on a salt-free diet.
examples.chinese: 布赖斯自从心脏病发作过后，就按无盐食谱进食。

centers.english: to stop eating or refuse to eat

examples.english: Muslims fast during Ramadan.
examples.chinese: 穆斯林在斋月里禁食。

examples.english: At the end of their fast, the people have a big party to celebrate.
examples.chinese: 禁食期结束之后，人们搞了一个很大的聚会来庆祝。

examples.english: More than 300 prisoners went on hunger strike in February in protest against the living conditions.
examples.chinese: 2月，300多名囚犯为他们的生活条件绝食抗议。

examples.english: 67 men had been on hunger strike since August 13th.
examples.chinese: 8月13日起已有67名男子在绝食了。

examples.english: What's wrong with Billy? He seems to be off his food.
examples.chinese: 比利怎么啦？他好像不想吃东西。

centers.english: when you have eaten enough or too much food
centers.chinese: 吃够了，或吃太多的食物

examples.english: ‘Would you like some dessert?’ ‘No thanks, I've had enough.’
examples.chinese: “你要来点甜点吗？”“不要了，谢谢，我已经够了。”

examples.english: Leave the rest if you've had enough.
examples.chinese: 如果你吃饱了，就由它剩着吧。

examples.english: ‘Would you like some more pie?’ ‘No thanks, I'm full.’
examples.chinese: “你还要来点馅饼吗？”“不要了，谢谢，我吃饱了。”

examples.english: The apple pie is delicious, but I won't have another slice - I couldn't eat another thing.
examples.chinese: 苹果馅饼很好吃，可我不要了一我再也吃不下了。

examples.english: I feel really bloated. I wish I hadn't eaten so much.
examples.chinese: 我真的吃得很撑了。真不应该吃那么多。

examples.english: He fell onto the sofa, his stomach bloated with food.
examples.chinese: 他倒在沙发上，肚子吃得胀鼓鼓的。

examples.english: It isn't wise to go swimming on a full stomach.
examples.chinese: 吃饱了去游泳是很不明智的。

centers.english: someone who enjoys eating a lot

examples.english: Don't give me such a large portion. I'm not a big eater.
examples.chinese: 别给我这么大一份，我的食量不大。

examples.english: What can I cook for them? They're such big eaters.
examples.chinese: 我可以给他们烧些什么菜呢？他们的食量都这么大。

examples.english: Give him a big plate of spaghetti. He likes his food.
examples.chinese: 给他一大盘意大利面条，他很能吃。

examples.english: ‘Now there's a man who likes his food,’ she said, as her brother took a third helping of pie.
examples.chinese: 她弟弟拿了第三份馅饼来吃，“瞧这个人胃口多好。”她说道。

examples.english: They're real gourmets and buy only the best cuts of meat.
examples.chinese: 他们真是美食家，只买最好的肉。

examples.english: Many gourmets say that Camembert should never be kept in a fridge.
examples.chinese: 许多美食家说卡芒贝尔奶酪绝不应存放在冰箱里。

examples.english: The shop only sells gourmet food, at astronomical prices.
examples.chinese: 该店只卖精美食品，价格高得惊人。

examples.english: a new magazine for foodies
examples.chinese: 一本新的美食家杂志

examples.english: Michael Caine is an avid foodie who owns a string of restaurants.
examples.chinese: 迈克尔·凯恩是个热衷于美食的人，他拥有好多餐馆。

centers.english: someone who only eats certain types of food

examples.english: Stan's such a picky eater; it's impossible to know what to cook for him.
examples.chinese: 斯坦很挑食，真不知道给他烧什么菜好。

examples.english: Are these mushrooms edible?
examples.chinese: 这些蘑菇可以吃吗?

examples.english: There are many edible fruits growing wild in the coastal forest.
examples.chinese: 在沿海森林地区，有许多可食用的野生水果。

examples.english: Onondaga Lake is now so polluted that the fish are inedible.
examples.chinese: 奥农多加湖现在污染很严重，鱼都不能吃了。

examples.english: Mark hadn't realized that the leaves of the rhubarb plant were inedible.
examples.chinese: 马克没有意识到大黄的叶子是不能食用的。

examples.english: Most of this meat is so old it is unfit for human consumption.
examples.chinese: 这肉大部分已经放得太久，不宜食用。

examples.english: Warning: Animal Feed only -- Unfit for human consumption.
examples.chinese: 注意：动物专用食物—不宜人类食用。

examples.english: I sometimes bite my fingernails when I'm nervous.
examples.chinese: 有时我一紧张就会咬指甲。

examples.english: Barry bit the corner of the packet to open it.
examples.chinese: 巴里在包装盒的角上咬了一下，把它打开。

examples.english: After two bites I realised the apple was rotten.
examples.chinese: 咬了两口之后，我发觉这是只烂苹果。

examples.english: She took a bite of doughnut, and chewed it slowly.
examples.chinese: 她咬了一口炸面圈，慢慢地嚼起来。

examples.english: ‘This looks delicious,’ he said, taking a bite.
examples.chinese: “这东西看起来很可口。”他说着就咬了一口。

examples.english: The dog's bitten off the heel of my shoe.
examples.chinese: 那条狗把我的鞋后跟咬掉了。

examples.english: He took out a cigar and bit the end off.
examples.chinese: 他取出一支雪茄并把一端咬去。

examples.english: Kenny's favourite party trick is to bite the caps off beer bottles.
examples.chinese: 肯尼在聚会上最爱露一手的把戏是把啤酒瓶盖一个个咬开。

examples.english: Earl picked up his sandwich and bit into it.
examples.chinese: 厄尔拿起三明治就咬起来。

examples.english: Henry cracked a tooth biting into a piece of hard candy.
examples.chinese: 亨利咬一块硬糖时弄坏了一颗牙。

examples.english: Don't worry about the dog - he won't bite.
examples.chinese: 别担心这狗，它不咬人的。

examples.english: She fought off her attacker, scratching and biting him.
examples.chinese: 她又抓又咬，击退了袭击者。

expressions.text: bite somebody on the face/hand/leg etc

examples.english: On just the second day of the trip, I was bitten on the leg by a snake.
examples.chinese: 出去旅行才第二天，我就被蛇在腿上咬了一口。

examples.english: The dog leapt at him, sinking its teeth into his arm.
examples.chinese: 那条狗向他猛扑过去，在他臂上狠狠地咬了一口。

examples.english: The shark sank its teeth into the soft flesh of his thigh.
examples.chinese: 鲨鱼在他柔软的大腿上咬了一口。

examples.english: Sean came running around the corner of the house with a small dog snapping at his heels.
examples.chinese: 肖恩在屋子转角处跑过来，身后跟着一只小狗要咬他。

examples.english: Every time your puppy snaps at someone, give him a smack on the butt with a rolled up newspaper.
examples.chinese: 你的小狗每次要咬人时，就用卷起的报纸在它屁股上打一下。

examples.english: When I took the hamster out of his cage, he nipped me.
examples.chinese: 我把仓鼠从笼子里拿出来时，它轻轻地咬了我一下。

examples.english: A school of fish swam around her feet, some nipping at her ankles.
examples.chinese: 一群鱼围在她脚边游，有些还轻啃她的脚踝呢。

examples.english: Don't try to pet the parrot - he could give you a really nasty bite.
examples.chinese: 别去抚弄鹦鹉，它可能会狠狠地咬你一口。

centers.english: a wound caused by an animal or insect biting you
centers.chinese: 被动物或昆虫咬的伤口

examples.english: Animal bites should be treated immediately.
examples.chinese: 被动物咬伤后应立即接受治疗。

examples.english: We woke up to find ourselves covered in mosquito bites.
examples.chinese: 我们醒来后发现自己浑身都被蚊子叮遍了。

centers.english: to bite something several times, especially food

examples.english: Chew your food. Don't eat so quickly.
examples.chinese: 好好嚼一下，别吃得这么快。

examples.english: Helen sat there, chewing a piece of gum.
examples.chinese: 海伦坐在那里，嚼着口香糖。

examples.english: I gave the baby my key ring to chew on.
examples.chinese: 我把钥匙圈给那婴儿嚼着玩。

examples.english: The dog lay in the yard and gnawed its bone.
examples.chinese: 狗躺在院子里啃骨头。

examples.english: The cat began to gnaw at the skin of the dead snake.
examples.chinese: 猫开始咬那条死蛇的皮。

examples.english: A rat's teeth are strong enough to gnaw through lead pipes.
examples.chinese: 老鼠的牙齿坚硬得足以咬穿铅管。

examples.english: There was a red mark where the pigeon had pecked her hand.
examples.chinese: 她的手被鸽子啄了后留下一块红印。

examples.english: The woodpecker's long beak is specially designed for pecking.
examples.chinese: 啄木鸟有很长的喙，专门用来啄食。

examples.english: Hens pecked at the corn scattered on the ground.
examples.chinese: 母鸡啄着散落在地上的谷粒。

examples.english: It takes several pecks for the chick to make a hole in the eggshell.
examples.chinese: 小鸡要啄好几下才能在蛋壳上啄出个洞来。

examples.english: We were really hungry after our long walk.
examples.chinese: 我们走了很长一段路，真是饿极了。

examples.english: Are you hungry? Do you want a sandwich?
examples.chinese: 你饿吗？你想来块三明治吗？

examples.english: Hungry shoppers waited in line at the food counters.
examples.chinese: 饥肠辘辘的购物者在食品柜台前排队等候。

expressions.text: feel like something to eat/want something to eat

examples.english: It's 12 o'clock - do you feel like something to eat?
examples.chinese: 12点钟了，你想吃点什么东西吗?

examples.english: Do you guys want something to eat?
examples.chinese: 你们想不想吃点东西？

examples.english: Can we talk about this after dinner, please? I'm famished.
examples.chinese: 我们吃过饭再谈这事，好吗？我饿坏了。

examples.english: I missed lunch and I'm starved.
examples.chinese: 我没吃午饭，饿死了。

examples.english: Normally she did not eat a lot in the morning, but today she was ravenous.
examples.chinese: 她早上一般吃得不多，但今天她饿坏了。

examples.english: I've been driving for eight hours non-stop and I am absolutely starving.
examples.chinese: 我连续开了八小时的车，现在饿极了。

examples.english: I'm feeling a bit peckish. What's in the fridge?
examples.chinese: 我觉得有点饿了。冰箱里有什么?

examples.english: The kids were getting peckish so Sammy found a cafe nearby.
examples.chinese: 孩子们有点饿了，于是萨米去找了附近的一家咖啡馆。

examples.english: If you get the munchies later on there are some cookies in the kitchen.
examples.chinese: 如果你过会儿想吃点东西，厨房里有些小甜饼。

examples.english: ‘How about something to eat?’ ‘No thanks, I'm not hungry.’
examples.chinese: “吃点东西怎么样？”“不，谢谢，我不饿。”

examples.english: We offered her some sandwiches but she said she wasn't hungry.
examples.chinese: 我们给她一些三明治，但她说不饿。

examples.english: I had a really big lunch, so I don't feel like anything just now.
examples.chinese: 我午饭吃得很饱，所以现在不想吃东西。

examples.english: ‘Do you want some toast?’ ‘No thanks, I don't want anything.’
examples.chinese: “你想来点吐司吗？”“不了，谢谢，我不想吃东西。〕

examples.english: Jane's not feeling too well and has lost her appetite.
examples.chinese: 简身体不太舒服，胃口也不好。

examples.english: I shifted the food around my plate, suddenly losing my appetite as he told me the news.
examples.chinese: 他把这个消息告诉了我，我翻拨着盘里的食物，一下子没了胃口。

centers.english: the feeling you have when you are hungry

examples.english: The baby screamed with hunger.
examples.chinese: 宝宝饿得尖叫起来。

examples.english: Many slimming diets don't provide enough calories to satisfy hunger.
examples.chinese: 许多瘦身食谱不能够提供足够的热量满足饥饿感。

examples.english: If you do feel hunger pangs, nibble on carrot, celery, or cucumber sticks.
examples.chinese: 如果你饿得感到不适，就吃点胡萝卜条、芹莱条或黄瓜条。

examples.english: How's his appetite? Is he getting enough to eat?
examples.chinese: 他胃口怎么样？吃的够多吗？

examples.english: She must be growing; she's got a big appetite right now.
examples.chinese: 她肯定正在发育，这阵子胃口很大。

examples.english: Don't eat any cake now. You'll spoil your appetite.
examples.chinese: 现在不要吃蛋糕了，会影响食欲的。

examples.english: Is it lunchtime yet? I'm getting hungry.
examples.chinese: 午饭时间到了没有？我饿了。

examples.english: After a long day walking across the hills they had worked up quite an appetite.
examples.chinese: 他们在山里走了一整天，食欲大增。

examples.english: There's nothing like skiing to work up an appetite.
examples.chinese: 滑雪最能增进食欲。

examples.english: All that exercise has given me an appetite.
examples.chinese: 这么多运动使我有了好胃口。

examples.english: Spending all day in the fresh air had given them all an appetite.
examples.chinese: 整天都在新鲜的空气环境中活动使他们都食欲大增。

examples.english: The people are starving and they need all the food and medical supplies we can give them.
examples.chinese: 那里的人民正在挨饿，他们需要我们尽量提供食物和药品。

examples.english: They have barely enough money to keep them from starving.
examples.chinese: 他们的钱只够勉强填饱肚子。

examples.english: a country full of starving people
examples.chinese: 一个充满饥民的国家

examples.english: The homeless and the starving, refugees of the war, were flocking to the cities.
examples.chinese: 无家可归者、饥民和战争难民一群群地涌入城市。

examples.english: The prisoners were taken out into the desert and left to starve.
examples.chinese: 囚犯们被押出去，扔进沙漠慢慢地饿死。

examples.english: In 1884, the crew of Young's ship nearly starved when they were blown off course.
examples.chinese: 1884年，扬的船被吹离航道，船员差一点饿死。

examples.english: Unless these people get food in the next two weeks they will starve to death.
examples.chinese: 这些人如果在两个星期之后还拿不到食物，就会活活饿死。

examples.english: My children are hungry, I need a job.
examples.chinese: 我的孩子们正在挨饿，我需要一份工作。

examples.english: Hungry people crowded around the relief wagon for food.
examples.chinese: 饥饿的人们拥在救济车周围要食物。

examples.english: If the crops fail again this year thousands of people will go hungry.
examples.chinese: 如果今年庄稼仍歉收，成千上万的人就会挨饿。

examples.english: The refugees in the camps are not getting enough to eat, and the living conditions are terrible.
examples.chinese: 难民营里的人没有足够的食物吃，生活条件非常糟糕。

examples.english: A baby who is not gaining weight is probably not getting enough to eat.
examples.chinese: 婴儿如果体重不增加，很可能是因为没有足够的东西吃。

examples.english: Poor dog! He looks half-starved.
examples.chinese: 好可怜的狗！它看上去像吃不饱似的。

examples.english: The soldiers were dirty and half-starved.
examples.chinese: 士兵们一副肮脏、饿得半死的样子。

examples.english: The servants were overworked and underfed.
examples.chinese: 佣人们劳累过度，食不果腹。

examples.english: fields full of underfed cattle
examples.chinese: 到处是处于饥饿状态的牛群的田野

examples.english: During the 1930s a large proportion of Britain's urban population was malnourished.
examples.chinese: 20世纪30年代，英国有很大比例的城市人口营养不良。

centers.english: when people are ill or dying because of not having enough food
centers.chinese: 人们因为没有足够的食物而面临疾病或死亡

examples.english: Many people could die from cold and hunger this winter as the war continues.
examples.chinese: 战争在继续，这个冬天可能会有许多人死于寒冷和饥饿。

examples.english: The slum-dwellers suffer from poverty, hunger, and disease.
examples.chinese: 贫民区居民遭受着穷困、饥饿和疾病的折磨。

examples.english: Weak with hunger, she staggered up to the cabin door.
examples.chinese: 她饿得身体发虚，摇摇晃晃地走到小木屋门口。

examples.english: The survivors were close to starvation when they were rescued.
examples.chinese: 生还者获救的时候都快饿死了。

examples.english: A global fall in the price of rice spread hardship and even starvation to many parts of Indochina.
examples.chinese: 全球米价下跌，使贫穷甚至饥饿的现象扩大到了印度支那的许多地区。

examples.english: 30 million people die of starvation each year.
examples.chinese: 每年有3,000万人死于饥饿。

examples.english: Thousands of refugees are on the brink of starvation in camps south of the capital.
examples.chinese: 首都南面的难民营里有成千上万的难民因为饥饿而濒临死亡。

examples.english: Many of the children showed signs of malnutrition.
examples.chinese: 许多孩子都有营养不良的症状。

examples.english: A survey of US households found evidence of malnutrition in those persons with the lowest incomes.
examples.chinese: 一项针对美国家庭的调查发现，收入最低的人当中有营养不良的情况出现。

examples.english: Millions of people in Africa continue to die because of war and famine.
examples.chinese: 非洲仍有几百万人继续死于战争和饥荒。

examples.english: The four-year drought has caused widespread famine across Afghanistan.
examples.chinese: 四年的干旱导致阿富汗出现大饥荒。

centers.english: feeling that you want to drink something

examples.english: Are you thirsty? Do you want some juice?
examples.chinese: 你口渴吗？要不要喝点果汁？

examples.english: On a hot day, your dog can become very thirsty, so make sure they have plenty of water.
examples.chinese: 大热天你的狗会口渴得很，所以要确保让它们多喝水。

examples.english: By the time you actually feel thirsty, your body is already slightly dehydrated.
examples.chinese: 等到你感到口渴时，你的身体实际上已经轻度脱水了。

examples.english: Stands were set up to satisfy the thousands of thirsty people expected at the event.
examples.chinese: 搭起了一些摊位以应对前来参加这次活动的数千名群众的口渴之需。

examples.english: I'll have a beer. Gardening is thirsty work, you know.
examples.chinese: 我想喝杯啤酒。要知道干园艺活可是使人容易口渴的呀。

examples.english: Jeez it's hot. I need a drink.
examples.chinese: 唷，真热，我要喝一杯了。

examples.english: I need another drink if we're going to keep talking about this.
examples.chinese: 如果我们打算继续谈这件事的话，我得再来一杯。

expressions.text: be dying for/ be gasping for

examples.english: We were dying for a Coke, so we stopped at a fast-food place.
examples.chinese: 我们很想喝杯可乐，因此就在一家快餐店前停了下来。

examples.english: I'm gasping for a cup of tea.
examples.chinese: 我非常想喝杯茶。

examples.english: I'm dying for a drink. Want to go for a pint?
examples.chinese: 我很想喝一杯。想不想去喝点儿啤酒？

examples.english: My throat was so dry I could hardly speak.
examples.chinese: 我喉咙干得几乎都不能说话了。

examples.english: She put her water bottle to his parched lips.
examples.chinese: 她把水瓶送到他那干裂的唇边。

examples.english: Give me a sip of that I'm parched.
examples.chinese: 给我喝一口，我渴极了。

examples.english: They were dirty and parched, but in remarkably good condition after the rescue.
examples.chinese: 他们又脏又渴，但被营救后身体状况却相当不错。

examples.english: When exercising, especially in the heat, drink often or you will become dehydrated.
examples.chinese: 锻炼身体时，尤其是在高温下进行锻炼要经常喝水，不然会脱水的。

examples.english: Children who have diarrhoea can quickly become severely dehydrated.
examples.chinese: 儿童患腹泻后会很快严重脱水。

examples.english: The soldiers suffered constantly from hunger and thirst.
examples.chinese: 这些士兵经常受着饥渴之苦。

examples.english: After a workout, juices are excellent because they quench your thirst and replace fluids and carbohydrates.
examples.chinese: 锻炼之后喝果汁很不错，不但解渴而且还补充了液体和碳水化合物。

examples.english: Seven people died of thirst after their truck broke down on an isolated desert road.
examples.chinese: 卡车在偏僻的沙漠公路上抛锚后，有七个人死于缺水。

examples.english: The bars and cafes cater to tourists who have worked up a thirst sightseeing.
examples.chinese: 这些酒吧和咖啡馆为观光游览后感到口渴的游客提供服务。

examples.english: The hotel was nice, and the meals were really good.
examples.chinese: 这家旅馆很不错，饭菜非常可口。

examples.english: Miriam was silent all through the meal.
examples.chinese: 用餐时米利亚姆始终一声不响。

examples.english: You shouldn't exercise after a big meal.
examples.chinese: 饱餐后不要进行锻炼。

examples.english: We had an excellent meal in a Chinese restaurant.
examples.chinese: 我们在一家中国餐馆吃了顿美餐。

examples.english: Jeff cooked us a delicious meal last night.
examples.chinese: 杰夫昨晚为我们做了顿很可口的饭。

examples.english: Would you like to go out for a meal sometime, Emma?
examples.chinese: 埃玛，哪天出去吃一顿饭好吗?

expressions.text: take somebody out for a meal

examples.english: It was Lisa's birthday so we took her out for a meal.
examples.chinese: 那天是莉萨的生日，我们就请她出去吃一顿。

examples.english: We usually have our main meal in the middle of the day.
examples.chinese: 我们通常都在中午吃主餐。

examples.english: Can I get you something to eat?
examples.chinese: 我给你弄点吃的吧？

examples.english: We'll have something to eat, and then go out.
examples.chinese: 我们弄点吃的，然后就出去。

examples.english: A young baby needs small feeds at frequent intervals.
examples.chinese: 婴儿吃东西需要少量多餐。

examples.english: Lois has gotten tired of the late night feedings.
examples.chinese: 洛伊丝对深夜里喂奶已感到很疲惫了。

examples.english: Her baby has its lunchtime feed, then goes to sleep.
examples.chinese: 她的宝宝中午吃过后就睡觉了。

examples.english: What do you want for breakfast - cereal or toast?
examples.chinese: 早餐你吃什么—谷类食物还是烤面包片？

examples.english: After breakfast we went for a walk on the beach.
examples.chinese: 早饭以后我们去海滩散步。

examples.english: George was having his breakfast when the phone rang.
examples.chinese: 乔治正在吃早餐时电话铃响了。

examples.english: On the first day of the vacation we all slept late, then had a huge brunch.
examples.chinese: 休假的第一天我们都起得很晚，然后吃了一顿丰富的早午餐。

examples.english: They served smoked salmon, cream cheese and bagels for brunch.
examples.chinese: 早午餐他们提供烟熏鲑鱼、奶油乳酪和面包圈。

centers.english: a meal in the middle of the day

examples.english: At work we are allowed one hour for lunch.
examples.chinese: 工作时间内我们有一小时吃午饭。

examples.english: See you after lunch.
examples.chinese: 午餐后见。

examples.english: Shall we have lunch before we go out?
examples.chinese: 我们出去之前要不要先吃午饭？

examples.english: We had an early lunch and spent the afternoon shopping.
examples.chinese: 我们早早地吃了午饭，把下午的时间花在购物上。

examples.english: We always have roast beef for Sunday lunch.
examples.chinese: 星期日午餐我们总是吃烤牛肉。

examples.english: He comes home for his dinner, then goes back to the factory.
examples.chinese: 他回家来吃午饭，然后再回工厂去。

examples.english: She used to hate school dinners.
examples.chinese: 她以前很讨厌学校的午餐。

examples.english: We had some friends round for Sunday dinner.
examples.chinese: 我们请了些朋友来吃星期日午餐。

examples.english: In one of my less lucid moments, I had volunteered to host Thanksgiving dinner.
examples.chinese: 我脑子一时糊涂，就主动提出感恩节午餐由我操办。

examples.english: In Spain, the midday meal almost always starts with tomato salad.
examples.chinese: 在西班牙，午饭几乎总是以番茄沙拉开始的。

examples.english: The noon meal was carried out to the fields where the harvesters were working.
examples.chinese: 午饭被送到了田地里，人们正在那里收割庄稼。

examples.english: What shall we have for dinner?
examples.chinese: 我们晚饭吃什么呢?

examples.english: Sarah cooked us a really nice dinner.
examples.chinese: 萨拉给我们做了一顿很好吃的晚餐。

examples.english: At dinner, he announced that he was leaving home.
examples.chinese: 晚餐时他宣布要离家搬出去住。

examples.english: Shall we discuss this over dinner?
examples.chinese: 我们晚餐时讨论这件事好吗？

examples.english: We went out for dinner at the Ritz.
examples.chinese: 我们出去到里兹饭店吃了晚餐。

examples.english: Why don't you come and have dinner with us?
examples.chinese: 你何不过来和我们一起吃晚饭？

examples.english: After supper we watched a video.
examples.chinese: 晚餐后我们看了一盒录像。

examples.english: I had my supper and went to bed.
examples.chinese: 我吃过晚饭就上床睡觉了。

examples.english: What's for tea?
examples.chinese: 傍晚茶吃什么？

examples.english: The children came home from school, had tea and did their homework.
examples.chinese: 孩子们放学回家，吃了傍晚茶，然后做了功课。

examples.english: After the evening meal they sat around the cooking-fire and talked.
examples.chinese: 晚饭之后，他们围坐在火炉旁谈话。

examples.english: Preparing the evening meal can take up to three hours.
examples.chinese: 做晚饭可以花上多达三小时。

examples.english: He is a charming man, the kind of person you would want to sit next to at a dinner party.
examples.chinese: 他风度翩翩，是宴会上你想坐在他身边的那种人。

examples.english: We're having a dinner party on Tuesday. Would you like to come?
examples.chinese: 我们星期二有个宴会。你想来吗？

examples.english: She had a ticket for a dinner and fashion show at the Castle Hotel.
examples.chinese: 她有一张在城堡酒店举行的晚宴和时装表演的门票。

examples.english: Ann and I attended a dinner at the City Chamber of Commerce.
examples.chinese: 我和安出席了在市商会举行的晚宴。

examples.english: A huge banquet was planned to celebrate the city's millennium.
examples.chinese: 为纪念该城建立一千周年，计划举办一场盛大的宴会。

examples.english: a state banquet hosted by the French Prime Minister
examples.chinese: 由法国总理举行的一次国宴

examples.english: Over 200 attended the Women in Journalism luncheon last Tuesday.
examples.chinese: 二百多人参加了上周二的女性新闻工作者午餐会。

examples.english: We took a picnic down to the beach.
examples.chinese: 我们在海滩吃野餐。

examples.english: It was a beautiful day - we had a picnic by the river.
examples.chinese: 那天天气很好，我们在河边野餐。

examples.english: In summer, we sometimes go on picnics together.
examples.chinese: 夏天时我们有时一起去野餐。

examples.english: Some campgrounds provide a picnic table right outside your door.
examples.chinese: 有些野营地会提供一张就在你门外的野餐桌。

examples.english: Pack a picnic lunch and head for the country.
examples.chinese: 装好野餐到郊外去。

examples.english: I'll get some burgers and ribs for the barbecue.
examples.chinese: 我去为烧烤野餐准备些汉堡牛肉饼和肋条肉。

examples.english: If the weather's nice we'll have a barbecue.
examples.chinese: 假如天气好，我们就吃烧烤野餐。

examples.english: Guests can dine al fresco on a terrace with stunning views of the valley below.
examples.chinese: 客人们可以在户外的阳台上用餐，俯瞰山谷的美景。

examples.english: I'd enjoy al fresco eating much more if it wasn't for all the wasps!
examples.chinese: 如果没有这些黄蜂的话，我就能够更好地享受在户外用餐了！

centers.english: a meal you buy in a restaurant and eat at home
centers.chinese: 在餐厅购买但在家中吃的一餐

examples.english: Dave just lives on beer and takeaways.
examples.chinese: 戴夫就靠喝啤酒吃外卖过日子。

examples.english: I don't feel like cooking tonight -- can we get some takeout?
examples.chinese: 我今晚不想做饭—我们去买外卖好吗？

examples.english: a takeout pizza
examples.chinese: 外卖比萨饼

examples.english: Joe ordered a slice of pizza and a Coke to go.
examples.chinese: 乔要了一块比萨饼和一杯可口可乐带回去吃。

examples.english: Do you want that hamburger to eat here or to take away?
examples.chinese: 那只汉堡包你是在这里吃还是要带走？

examples.english: I can't eat a three-course meal at lunch time -- it's just too much.
examples.chinese: 午饭时间我吃不下三道菜—实在太多了。

examples.english: You can get a three-course meal for $25 in the barbecue grill.
examples.chinese: 在烧烤餐馆你花上25美元可以吃一顿有三道菜的饭。

examples.english: There were over sixty guests at the wedding feast.
examples.chinese: 婚宴上有六十多位客人。

examples.english: The Christmas celebrations in Fiji are rounded off by a huge feast on Christmas Day.
examples.chinese: 斐济的圣诞庆典以圣诞节那天举行的盛大宴会结束。

examples.english: You shouldn't eat a heavy meal before going swimming.
examples.chinese: 游泳之前你不该吃得太饱。

examples.english: After a heavy lunch my father fell asleep almost immediately.
examples.chinese: 午餐饱餐一顿后，我父亲几乎立刻就睡着了。

examples.english: If they give me the job I'll take you out for a slap-up meal.
examples.chinese: 如果他们把那份工作给我，那我就请你到外面好好地吃顿美餐。

examples.english: They were looking forward to the spread that Judith had prepared.
examples.chinese: 他们都盼望着吃朱迪丝准备的那顿筵席。

centers.english: a meal in which you choose and serve your own food

examples.english: We're not having a big formal meal at the wedding - just a buffet.
examples.chinese: 婚礼上我们不是吃盛大正式的宴会餐，只是自助餐。

examples.english: Try out all-you-can-eat buffet - only £5 per person
examples.chinese: 请尝尝我们的自助餐，随你吃饱，每位只需五英镑。

examples.english: We'll have a buffet lunch at about one o'clock and a sit-down meal in the evening.
examples.chinese: 下午约1点钟我们用自助午餐，晚上用桌餐。

examples.english: She prepared a light lunch of salad and cheese.
examples.chinese: 她用沙拉和乳酪准备了一顿小量的午餐。

examples.english: You can have a light meal four hours before the game but only have drinks after that.
examples.chinese: 赛前四小时你可以稍稍吃点东西，不过此后就只能喝饮料。

examples.english: Just before bedtime he had a snack of bread and cheese.
examples.chinese: 就在上床之前，他吃了点面包和乳酪作点心。

examples.english: The children have mid-morning snacks at about 11 o'clock -- usually fruit and a drink.
examples.chinese: 孩子们在大约11点时吃上午的点心—一般是水果和一杯饮料。

examples.english: We'll have a bite then go into town.
examples.chinese: 我们随便吃些东西然后进城去。

examples.english: There's just time for a quick bite to eat before the film begins.
examples.chinese: 电影开映前刚好还有点时间可以抓紧吃些东西。

examples.english: The children walked around at the party offering refreshments.
examples.chinese: 孩子们在晚会上走来走去给大家送茶点。

examples.english: Meetings are open to the public, and refreshments are provided.
examples.chinese: 会议向公众开放，并提供茶点。

examples.english: Catering tents provide coffee, snacks, and other light refreshments.
examples.chinese: 饮食供应棚提供咖啡、小吃和其他小点心。

examples.english: The waiter brought the first course, a simple leek and potato soup.
examples.chinese: 侍者送上了第一道菜，是普通的韭葱马铃薯汤。

examples.english: a five-course banquet
examples.chinese: 五道菜的宴会

examples.english: For the main course we had roast turkey with vegetables.
examples.chinese: 我们吃的主菜是配有蔬菜的烤火鸡。

examples.english: My favourite Italian dish is lasagne.
examples.chinese: 我最喜欢的意大利菜是卤汁宽面条。

examples.english: In addition to the extensive Tandoori menu, there is a wide selection of vegetarian dishes.
examples.chinese: 除了品种丰富的唐杜里菜单外，还有各种各样的素食菜肴。

examples.english: What would you like for a starter - soup or garlic mushrooms?
examples.chinese: 第一道菜你想要什么—汤还是蒜头蘑菇?

examples.english: a delightful appetizer of small clams
examples.chinese: 一道可口的小蛤蜊开胃菜

examples.english: ‘Would you like a dessert, Madam?’ ‘Yes please, I'll have the cheesecake.’
examples.chinese: “夫人，您要什么甜点吗？”“好的，我要乳酪蛋糕。”

examples.english: I had fruit salad for dessert.
examples.chinese: 甜食我要了水果沙拉。

examples.english: At children's parties, it's traditional to have jelly and ice-cream for pudding.
examples.chinese: 在孩子们的聚会上，传统的甜点是果冻和冰淇淋。

examples.english: We're having roast beef, with apple pie for afters.
examples.chinese: 我们吃烤牛肉，甜食是苹果馅饼。

examples.english: For afters, it's rice pudding.
examples.chinese: 甜点是大米布丁。

examples.english: The forest fires in the Northwest are spreading out of control.
examples.chinese: 西北地区的森林大火在蔓延，渐渐失去了控制。

examples.english: By then, the flood water had spread across 80 square miles of farmland.
examples.chinese: 那时候，洪水已经淹没了80平方英里的农田。

examples.english: She knocked over her glass, and a dark pool of wine spread over the tablecloth.
examples.chinese: 她打翻了杯子，一滩深红色的葡萄酒在桌布上渗了开来。

examples.english: The fire quickly spread to several nearby factories.
examples.chinese: 火势很快就蔓延到邻近的几家工厂。

examples.english: Soon the gas had permeated the entire area.
examples.chinese: 不久这种气体便扩散到了整个地区。

examples.english: The stench of smoke permeated the air.
examples.chinese: 空气中弥漫着臭臭的烟味。

examples.english: I'm afraid the colors ran when I washed your shirt.
examples.chinese: 恐怕你的衬衫在洗的时候掉色了。

examples.english: She had started crying and her make-up was running down her face.
examples.chinese: 她哭了起来，脸上的妆弄花了脸。

examples.english: After she died at a San Jose hospital, word spread fast.
examples.chinese: 她在圣何塞医院去世的消息很快就传开了。

examples.english: News of the disaster was spreading quickly.
examples.chinese: 受灾的消息很快传了开来。

examples.english: Rumors about Amy spread through the school.
examples.chinese: 学校里流传着有关埃米的种种谣言。

examples.english: The lawsuit charged the magazine with spreading lies about the company and its products.
examples.chinese: 这场官司控告杂志社散布与这家公司和它的产品有关的谣言。

examples.english: Panic spread through downtown Port-au-Prince.
examples.chinese: 太子港市中心蔓延着一片恐慌。

examples.english: News soon got around that Nick was back in Barnstable.
examples.chinese: 尼克已经回到巴恩斯特布尔的消息很快就传开了。

examples.english: It's a small place, so news and gossip gets around pretty quickly.
examples.chinese: 这是一个小地方，所以有什么新闻和流言都传得很快。

examples.english: It didn't take long for word to get around that Moore was leaving the company.
examples.chinese: 没多久消息就传开了，说穆尔要离开公司。

examples.english: The organization's intranet system allows information to circulate rapidly.
examples.chinese: 这个机构的内联网体系可以使信息传播得很快。

examples.english: Rumors began circulating that she was seriously ill.
examples.chinese: 有谣言在流传，说她病情严重。

examples.english: The letter was circulated among news organizations nationwide.
examples.chinese: 这封信在全国各地的新闻机构之间流传。

examples.english: Racist messages are being widely disseminated via the Internet.
examples.chinese: 带有种族主义思想的言论在互联网上广泛流传。

examples.english: The Health Education Council is the central agency for disseminating information about disease prevention.
examples.chinese: 健康教育委员会是传播预防疾病信息的中心机构。

examples.english: It is very dangerous for a government to have complete control over the dissemination of information within a country.
examples.chinese: 一个国家的信息传播完全由政府控制，这是非常危险的。

examples.english: It is easy to allow personal emotions to spill over into your work.
examples.chinese: 个人情感很容易影响到工作。

examples.english: Government chiefs are worried that the refugee problem might spill over from neighboring countries.
examples.chinese: 政府的长官担心邻国的难民问题会蔓延开来。

examples.english: Malaria, spread by mosquitoes, is one of the biggest public health problems in Africa.
examples.chinese: 由蚊子传播的疟疾是非洲最大的公共卫生问题之一。

examples.english: AIDS is not spread by common everyday contact.
examples.chinese: 一般日常接触不会传播艾滋病。

examples.english: Cholera is spreading through the refugee camps at an alarming rate.
examples.chinese: 霍乱以惊人的速度在难民营中传播。

examples.english: Meyer and his team were the first to show how the disease spreads from animals to humans.
examples.chinese: 迈耶和他的研究小组最先揭示了这种疾病如何从动物传给人类。

examples.english: The only way to prevent the spread of tuberculosis is to cure those infected by the disease.
examples.chinese: 防止肺结核的传播，唯一的办法是治愈那些已经感染的人。

examples.english: There's some type of throat infection going around at the moment.
examples.chinese: 这阵子好像流行一种喉疾。

examples.english: If one child gets flu, it seems to go round the entire school within a week.
examples.chinese: 如果一个孩子得了流感，好像一个星期内就会传遍整个学校。

examples.english: Heavy drinkers are generally more susceptible to infectious diseases.
examples.chinese: 喝酒多的人一般更容易感染传染性疾病。

examples.english: Doctors say that the disease is most infectious in the first twenty-four hours.
examples.chinese: 医生说这病在最初的24小时里传染性最强。

examples.english: The vaccine protects against Hepatitis B, a highly infectious virus.
examples.chinese: 这种疫苗预防传染性很强的乙型肝炎病毒。

examples.english: Kristen has the flu, so I guess we'll all catch it.
examples.chinese: 克里斯滕得了流感，我估计我们都会传染上。

examples.english: Dion caught a cold on vacation.
examples.chinese: 戴恩在度假的时候得了感冒。

examples.english: I hope Shelly's cold isn't catching.
examples.chinese: 我希望谢利的感冒不会传染。

examples.english: I'm keeping Timmy home from school. He has measles and you know how catching it is.
examples.chinese: 我让蒂米留在家里不要去上学。他得了麻疹，你知道这种病很容易传染。

examples.english: Most eye infections are contagious.
examples.chinese: 多数眼部感染都会传染。

examples.english: Chicken pox is highly contagious.
examples.chinese: 水痘传染性很强。

centers.english: to spread things over a wide area
centers.chinese: 把东西在很大的地方分散开

examples.english: The wind spreads the seeds so that the plants can reproduce.
examples.chinese: 风吹散种子，使植物可以繁衍。

examples.english: A single tractor was slowly spreading fertilizer over a huge wheatfield.
examples.chinese: 仅有的一台拖拉机在一块很大的麦田上慢慢地播撒肥料。

examples.english: The storm scattered tiles everywhere.
examples.chinese: 风暴吹得瓦片散落在各处。

examples.english: Why don't you scatter a few cushions around the room?
examples.chinese: 你为什么不在房间里放几个垫子呢？

centers.english: when people or things are spread over a wide area
centers.chinese: 人或物分散在很大的一片地方

examples.english: There were books scattered all about their cottage.
examples.chinese: 他们的小屋里到处都散放着书。

examples.english: Pieces of twisted metal and rusted pipe lay scattered around the yard.
examples.chinese: 一段段变形的金属和生锈的管子散在院子里。

examples.english: Diane had her newspaper spread out all over the floor.
examples.chinese: 戴安娜把报纸散了一地。

examples.english: Several small cabins were spread out across the property.
examples.chinese: 这一片土地上零零散散有几间小木屋。

examples.english: The sprawling conference and resort center even has its own transportation system.
examples.chinese: 这个杂乱无序地扩展的会议度假中心甚至有自己的交通运输系统。

examples.english: a sprawling city of 2.6 million
examples.chinese: 一个有260万人口、杂乱无序地发展的大城市

examples.english: All we saw were a few workmen's cottages dotted here and there along the road.
examples.chinese: 我们沿途看到的只有星星点点的几处工人宿舍。

examples.english: Picnic tables were dotted among the trees.
examples.chinese: 野餐桌东一处、西一处地分布在林间。

examples.english: Their street was dotted with burned-out and boarded-up buildings.
examples.chinese: 他们的街道上到处都是烧空了并用木板封起来的房子。

examples.english: Clothes were strewn all over the bedroom floor.
examples.chinese: 卧室里满地都是衣服。

examples.english: Glover's yard was strewn with garbage and builders’ debris.
examples.chinese: 格洛弗的院子里到处都是垃圾和建筑瓦砾。

centers.english: when people go in many directions

examples.english: Refugees have entered the south of the country and are spreading northwards.
examples.chinese: 难民已进入本国南部地区，正在向北扩散。

examples.english: When a police van drove by, the boys scattered.
examples.chinese: 一辆警车驶过，男孩子们便逃散了。

examples.english: At the sound of gunfire, the crowd scattered in all directions.
examples.chinese: 枪声一响，人群便四散而逃。

examples.english: ‘Spread out!’ the sergeant shouted. ‘I want the whole area searched.’
examples.chinese: “大家散开！”中士喊道，“我要你们搜查整个地区。”

examples.english: I'm sure you'd be more comfortable if you spread yourselves out a little.
examples.chinese: 如果你们分开点，我肯定你们会舒服些。

examples.english: Members of the tribe are spread out over hundreds of square miles.
examples.chinese: 部落成员分散居住在好几百平方英里的地方。

examples.english: The men were told to fan out and begin the search.
examples.chinese: 那些人被命令散开，开始搜查。

examples.english: Scores of FBI agents fanned out on Monday to interview potential witnesses.
examples.chinese: 星期一，大批联邦探员分头找了有可能目击事故的人问话。

examples.english: The U.N. team split up to inspect several sites in the south of the country.
examples.chinese: 联合国调查小组分头检查了该国南部的几个地方。

examples.english: We'd have a much better chance of finding the child if we split up into groups.
examples.chinese: 如果我们分组寻找，找到孩子的希望会大得多。

centers.english: to spread butter, glue etc on a surface
centers.chinese: 在某物表面上涂抹黄油、胶水等

examples.english: Make sure that you spread the glue on both surfaces.
examples.chinese: 一定要两面都涂上胶水。

examples.english: He spread plaster on the walls.
examples.chinese: 他在墙上涂上灰泥。

examples.english: Spread the frosting over the warm pastries.
examples.chinese: 在温热的油酥面皮上抹上糖霜。

examples.english: She spread the toast with butter and jam.
examples.chinese: 她在烤面包片上涂上黄油和果酱。

examples.english: ‘What time did we say we'd meet them?’ she asked, smearing on a bright red lipstick.
examples.chinese: “我们说好什么时候和他们碰头？”她一边问，一边擦着一支鲜红色的唇膏。

examples.english: Before setting out on their walk, they smeared themselves with sunblock.
examples.chinese: 他们出去散步之前在身上涂了防晒霜。

centers.english: to open something out and arrange it on a surface
centers.chinese: 把某物摊开在一个表面上

examples.english: Jim spread out a blanket for her to sit on.
examples.chinese: 吉姆摊开一块毯子让她坐在上面。

examples.english: Spread the map out and let's have a look.
examples.chinese: 把地图打开，我们来看一下。

examples.english: I spread the towels over the radiator to dry.
examples.chinese: 我把毛巾摊在暖气片上烘干。

examples.english: They spent over an hour laying the food out for the party.
examples.chinese: 他们花了一个多小时摆放为聚会准备的食物。

examples.english: I laid all four bathing suits out on the counter and tried to picture myself in one of them.
examples.chinese: 我把四件泳装全摆出来放在柜台上，想象自己穿上是什么样子。

centers.english: to press something so hard that it breaks, folds, or becomes flat

examples.english: Someone sat on my hat and squashed it.
examples.chinese: 有人坐在我的帽子上把它压扁了。

examples.english: He wouldn't even squash a fly, let alone murder someone.
examples.chinese: 他甚至连一只苍蝇都不会去拍，更别说杀人了。

examples.english: He squashed the can flat between his hands.
examples.chinese: 他用双手把罐子压扁。

examples.english: His leg was crushed in the accident.
examples.chinese: 他的腿在事故中被压断了。

examples.english: Coconuts have to be crushed in order to extract their oil.
examples.chinese: 椰子需压碎才能榨油。

examples.english: He closed his fist over the flower, crushing it into a pulp.
examples.chinese: 他握起拳头，把花砸得稀巴烂。

examples.english: He fell against me so heavily I thought he was going to flatten me.
examples.chinese: 他重重地摔在我身上，我以为他会把我压扁了呢。

examples.english: Her little car was completely flattened in the accident.
examples.chinese: 她的小汽车在车祸中完全给压扁了。

examples.english: Mash the bananas and add them to the mixture.
examples.chinese: 把香蕉捣烂，拌入混合物中。

examples.english: Boil the potatoes and then mash them up.
examples.chinese: 把马铃薯煮熟，然后捣成泥状。

examples.english: Grind some black pepper over the salad.
examples.chinese: 磨一些黑胡椒撒在沙拉上。

examples.english: These huge stones were once used for grinding wheat into flour.
examples.chinese: 这些大石头以前是用来碾磨面粉的。

examples.english: He pounded some garlic and ginger and put it in the pan.
examples.chinese: 他捣了一些蒜和姜放入锅里。

examples.english: Here the loose earth had been pounded flat by thousands of feet.
examples.chinese: 这里松软的泥土被无数双脚踏平了。

examples.english: Friends come to help us gather the crop and press the grapes.
examples.chinese: 朋友们过来帮忙收割庄稼和榨葡萄。

examples.english: Enough olives had been gathered and pressed to produce 1000 litres of cooking oil.
examples.chinese: 橄榄收成很好，榨出1,000升食用油。

examples.english: Sally screwed up the letter she was writing and threw it into the wastebasket.
examples.chinese: 萨莉把正在写的信揉成一团，扔进废纸篓里。

examples.english: He screwed his handkerchief up into a ball and put it in his pocket.
examples.chinese: 他把手帕揉成一团放进口袋里。

examples.english: He crumpled the cheque and threw it across the room.
examples.chinese: 他把支票揉成一团，从房间那边扔过来。

examples.english: Crumple up the bedclothes so it looks as though you slept there.
examples.chinese: 把床铺弄皱，装成你睡过的样子。

examples.english: He held out a squashed packet of cigarettes and offered me one.
examples.chinese: 他拿出一包压得皱巴巴的香烟，给了我一支。

examples.english: We can't give her those chocolates - they're all squashed.
examples.chinese: 我们不能把那些巧克力送给她一全压坏了。

examples.english: Remove the butter from the heat and stir in the crushed biscuits.
examples.chinese: 黄油加热后拿出来，拌入压碎的饼干。

examples.english: The dog hurtled through the garden, leaving a trail of crushed plants.
examples.chinese: 那只狗飞奔着穿过花园，使花草倒了一路。

examples.english: There was a flattened Coca-Cola can on the ground.
examples.chinese: 地上有一个压扁了的可口可乐罐子。

examples.english: a mountain of flattened cardboard boxes
examples.chinese: 一堆压扁的纸板箱

examples.english: He ate the mashed potatoes but not the meat.
examples.chinese: 他吃了土豆泥，但没有吃肉。

examples.english: a spoonful of mashed swede
examples.chinese: 一匙大头菜泥

examples.english: freshly ground black coffee
examples.chinese: 即磨的黑咖啡

examples.english: ground almonds
examples.chinese: 杏仁粉

examples.english: She was so drunk she could hardly stand up.
examples.chinese: 她醉得几乎无法站起来。

examples.english: Gary was too drunk to remember what had happened that night.
examples.chinese: 加里醉得很厉害，以致无法记起当晚发生的事。

examples.english: I just hope they don't get too drunk and start fighting.
examples.chinese: 我只是希望他们不会醉得打起架来。

examples.english: Every time she goes to a party she gets pissed.
examples.chinese: 她每次参加聚会都会喝醉。

examples.english: Don't listen to him - he's pissed.
examples.chinese: 别听他的，他醉了。

expressions.text: have had too much to drink/have had one too many

examples.english: I'd better take Tanya home - she's had too much to drink.
examples.chinese: 我最好送塔尼娅回家，她喝得太多了。

examples.english: He usually has one too many and starts making a fool of himself.
examples.chinese: 他经常喝酒过量，然后就开始出丑。

examples.english: A couple of drunken sailors were arguing with a policeman outside the bar.
examples.chinese: 几个喝得醉醺醺的水手在酒吧外跟一个警察争吵。

examples.english: The place was full of noise and drunken shouting.
examples.chinese: 这个地方闹哄哄的，醉汉们在大声叫嚷。

examples.english: Many of their beer parties ended in a drunken brawl.
examples.chinese: 他们很多次的喝啤酒聚会都以喝醉了打架结束。

examples.english: We found him lying by the roadside in a drunken stupor.
examples.chinese: 我们发现他躺在路旁，醉得不省人事。

examples.english: She hated Morel because of his constant drunkenness and his violent temper.
examples.chinese: 她恨莫雷尔，因为他经常喝醉酒，脾气火爆。

examples.english: Jensen was found guilty of driving while intoxicated.
examples.chinese: 詹森被判犯有醉酒驾车罪。

examples.english: Our policy is not to serve alcohol to anyone who is already intoxicated.
examples.chinese: 我们的政策是不卖酒给已经喝醉的人。

examples.english: He's already been arrested twice for public intoxication.
examples.chinese: 他因在公共场合醉酒已两次被捕。

examples.english: Have you guys been drinking all day?
examples.chinese: 你们整天都在喝酒吗？

examples.english: She answered the door in her bathrobe and I could tell she'd been drinking.
examples.chinese: 她穿着浴袍来开门，我看得出她喝酒了。

examples.english: After the second glass of wine I was feeling a little tipsy.
examples.chinese: 喝下第二杯酒后，我感到有些醉意。

examples.english: We went out to dinner, got a little tipsy, and ended up at my place.
examples.chinese: 我们出去吃饭，喝得微醉，最后留在我家过了夜。

examples.english: She wasn't drunk yet, but she was feeling nice and mellow and happy.
examples.chinese: 她还没完全喝醉，只是感觉很舒服，心情轻松愉快。

examples.english: She poured him another glass of brandy to keep him in a mellow mood.
examples.chinese: 她又给他倒了杯白兰地，使他保持愉快健谈的心情。

examples.english: We were all very merry by the time the party broke up.
examples.chinese: 聚会结束的时候，我们都有点醉意了。

examples.english: Some of the officers got quite merry celebrating our recent victory.
examples.chinese: 在庆祝最近一次胜利的时候，有些军官喝了点酒非常兴奋。

examples.english: This stuff is strong - I'm already a little buzzed.
examples.chinese: 这东西劲儿很大，我已经有点醉意了。

examples.english: Every Saturday night he came home blind drunk.
examples.chinese: 每个星期六的晚上他都喝得大醉回家。

examples.english: Don't give him anything more to drink. He's already blind drunk.
examples.chinese: 别再给他酒喝了。他已经酩酊大醉了。

examples.english: They were all roaring drunk and kept singing bawdy songs.
examples.chinese: 他们都喝得大醉，不停地唱着一些粗野的歌曲。

examples.english: We went to a nightclub in town last night and got absolutely plastered.
examples.chinese: 我们昨晚到城里的一家夜总会去，喝了个烂醉。

examples.english: She came home completely smashed at about 2 o'clock this morning.
examples.chinese: 她今天凌晨两点左右回家，喝得酩酊大醉。

examples.english: Man, you were so trashed. How much did you have to drink?
examples.chinese: 你呀，已经醉得这样子了，要喝多少才算个够？

examples.english: Did you see Kim at Rob's party? She was totally wasted.
examples.chinese: 罗伯的聚会上你看到金了吗？她醉得一塌糊涂。

examples.english: He's loaded. Somebody better call him a cab.
examples.chinese: 他烂醉了，最好谁给他叫辆出租车。

examples.english: I was so bombed, I can't even remember half of what I did.
examples.chinese: 我醉得都记不起自己干了些什么。

examples.english: Don't give Dave any more to drink -- he's already legless.
examples.chinese: 别再给戴夫喝什么了——他已经醉得走不动了。

examples.english: The day I got my exam results we went out and got absolutely paralytic.
examples.chinese: 我得知考试成绩的那天，我们出去喝了个酩酊大醉。

examples.english: Their idea of a good time is to go out and get drunk.
examples.chinese: 他们所想的玩得痛快是指出去喝个烂醉。

examples.english: I can't remember the last time I got drunk.
examples.chinese: 我记不起最后一次喝醉是什么时候了。

examples.english: She sometimes gets drunk on two glasses of wine.
examples.chinese: 她有时候喝两杯葡萄酒就会醉。

examples.english: After his girlfriend left he spent the evening drowning his sorrows in a local bar.
examples.chinese: 女朋友离开他之后，他那个晚上都在当地一家酒吧里借酒消愁。

examples.english: You can't just sit around day after day drowning your sorrows in whiskey.
examples.chinese: 你可不能日复一日地坐着靠威士忌来消除忧愁。

examples.english: When his wife died he hit the bottle again.
examples.chinese: 妻子死后，他又开始酗酒了。

examples.english: My sister's been hitting the bottle a lot lately and her work is starting to suffer.
examples.chinese: 我姐姐近来一直酗酒，她的工作已开始受到了影响。

centers.english: to drive while you are drunk

examples.english: Val's not the kind of person who would drink and drive.
examples.chinese: 瓦尔可不是那种会酒后驾车的人。

examples.english: I don't care if people who drink and drive kill themselves - what worries me is that they might kill someone else.
examples.chinese: 我才不担心那些酒后驾车的人会丧命呢，我担心的是他们可能会撞死别人。

examples.english: Drink driving causes over 800 deaths a year on the roads.
examples.chinese: 酒后驾车每年导致800多人死亡。

examples.english: He was convicted of drunk driving and had his license suspended.
examples.chinese: 他犯有酒后驾车罪，被吊销了驾驶执照。

examples.english: Her husband was nearly killed by a drunk driver.
examples.chinese: 她丈夫差一点被一个酒后驾车者撞死。

examples.english: He was caught driving over the limit and had to pay a large fine.
examples.chinese: 他醉酒驾车被捕，得缴付一大笔罚款。

examples.english: In a large proportion of fatal accidents it is found that one driver is over the limit.
examples.chinese: 在大部分的致命交通事故中，发现都有一个司机酒后驾车。

examples.english: Driving under the influence is a very serious offense.
examples.chinese: 酒后驾车是非常严重的罪行。

examples.english: Witnesses claimed that Jones was under the influence of alcohol at the time of the accident.
examples.chinese: 证人称琼斯在事发时处于醉酒状态。

examples.english: It was his first DUI offense.
examples.chinese: 这是他第一次犯酒后驾车罪。

examples.english: I've never had a DUI or any kind of drugs record.
examples.chinese: 我从没有酒后驾车或任何吸毒之类的犯罪纪录。

examples.english: Many alcoholics do not realize that they have a problem until it is too late.
examples.chinese: 许多嗜酒如命的人意识到自己的问题时都为时已晚了。

examples.english: I usually have a drink or two after work, but I don't think I'm an alcoholic.
examples.chinese: 下班后我通常喝一两杯酒，但我不认为自己是酒鬼。

examples.english: A couple of drunks were passed out on the sidewalk.
examples.chinese: 几个醉汉醉倒在人行道上。

examples.english: I don't like to take the bus at night. It's full of drunks and crazy people.
examples.chinese: 晚上我不喜欢乘公共汽车，车上都是酒鬼和疯子。

examples.english: He had the watery eyes and swollen nose of a drinker.
examples.chinese: 他泪水汪汪，鼻子红肿，是个酒鬼。

examples.english: Paul and Jane were both heavy drinkers and spent most of their time in the local bar.
examples.chinese: 保罗和简两个人都是酒鬼，他们把大部分时间都耗在当地的酒吧里。

examples.english: He quickly earned the reputation as a hard drinker and hell-raiser.
examples.chinese: 他很快就因酗酒和专爱惹是生非而出了名。

expressions.text: have a drink problem /have a drinking proble

examples.english: My sister has a drink problem but she won't admit it.
examples.chinese: 我姐姐酗酒成瘾，可她不愿意承认。

examples.english: From everything you tell me, it sounds as if your husband may have a drinking problem.
examples.chinese: 根据你告诉我的所有情况看，你丈夫似乎有酗酒成瘾的问题。

examples.english: You'll see her sitting at the bar all day. She's a real lush.
examples.chinese: 你会看到她整天坐在酒吧里。她是个名副其实的酒鬼。

examples.english: What are you drinking, you big lush?
examples.chinese: 你在喝什么，你这个酒鬼？

examples.english: They were all drunkards, but Arthur was the worst of them all.
examples.chinese: 他们都是醉鬼，而阿瑟是最厉害的一个。

examples.english: Unfortunately she had married an incurable drunkard.
examples.chinese: 不幸的是，她嫁了个不可救药的醉鬼。

centers.english: an occasion when people get drunk

examples.english: We usually get together with our friends for a booze-up at Christmas.
examples.chinese: 圣诞节我们通常跟朋友们聚在一起痛饮狂欢。

examples.english: The two met at a drunken party in college.
examples.chinese: 他俩是在大学里的一次狂饮聚会上相识的。

examples.english: She's going for a boozy night out with her friends.
examples.chinese: 她要去参加一个夜间聚会，和朋友们痛饮一番。

centers.english: when you feel ill the day after you have been drinking
centers.chinese: 酒醉后第二天的不舒服感觉

examples.english: Kevin woke up the next day with a terrible hangover.
examples.chinese: 凯文第二天醒来宿醉很严重。

examples.english: Could you try to keep the noise down? I've got a hangover.
examples.chinese: 你能不能小点声？我宿醉很不舒服。

examples.english: After all you had to drink last night, I'm surprised you don't have a hangover.
examples.chinese: 你昨晚喝了那么多酒竟然没有宿醉，我感到吃惊。

examples.english: I don't think I've ever seen Bill sober.
examples.chinese: 我从没看到比尔有不醉酒的时候。

examples.english: I'll drive you home - I think I'm the only one here that's sober.
examples.chinese: 我开车送你们回去吧。我想我是这里唯一清醒的人。

examples.english: He didn't sober up till he'd had a cup of strong coffee.
examples.chinese: 他喝了杯浓咖啡后才渐渐清醒过来。

examples.english: Give her a little time to sober up.
examples.chinese: 给她一点时间清醒清醒。

centers.english: able to drink a lot of alcohol

expressions.text: can hold your drink /can hold your liquor/alcoho

examples.english: He can really hold his drink. I've seen him drink seven whiskies and still play a good game of billiards.
