examples.chinese: 他的酒量真大。我见过他喝了七杯威士忌，可台球还是打得很好。

examples.english: Debra giggled again - she'd never held her liquor very well.
examples.chinese: 德布拉又咯咯笑了起来，她的酒量从来都不好。

centers.english: addicted to drugs, alcohol, tobacco etc
centers.chinese: 吸毒、喝酒、抽烟等上瘾的

examples.english: I tried to give up smoking several times before I realized I was addicted.
examples.chinese: 我几次试图戒烟，最后才意识到我已经上瘾了。

examples.english: By the time he was 16, he was addicted to heroin.
examples.chinese: 他16岁时对海洛因上了瘾。

examples.english: The children of mothers who use crack or cocaine are often born addicted to the drug.
examples.chinese: 如果母亲服用强效可卡因或可卡因，她们的孩子常常生下来就有毒瘾。

examples.english: She's been hooked on heroin since she was 15.
examples.chinese: 她15岁起就吸海洛因上了瘾。

examples.english: Don't let your children start smoking -- it's so easy for them to get hooked.
examples.chinese: 不要让你的孩子沾上香烟一他们会很容易上瘾的。

examples.english: It's almost impossible to take tranquilizers for long without becoming dependent.
examples.chinese: 长期服用镇定剂而不产生依赖性几乎是不可能的。

examples.english: About 10% of the population is dependent on some form of drug.
examples.chinese: 大约有百分之十的人对某些种类的药物有依赖性。

examples.english: Far more people are dependent on alcohol than we realize.
examples.chinese: 喝酒成瘾的人远比我们所知道的要多。

centers.english: someone who is addicted to a drug

examples.english: It's difficult for most smokers to admit that they are addicts.
examples.chinese: 大多数吸烟者都不肯承认自己有烟瘾。

examples.english: A lot of women drug addicts become prostitutes in order to get money to buy drugs.
examples.chinese: 许多吸毒上瘾的妇女为了弄钱买毒品而做了妓女。

examples.english: Heroin addicts run an increased risk of getting AIDS.
examples.chinese: 对海洛因上瘾的人感染艾滋病的风险会加大。

examples.english: The city has proposed a plan to register all drug users at a special clinic.
examples.chinese: 该市已提出一项计划，让所有的吸毒者到一家专科诊所作登记。

examples.english: Once a user himself, Gary now works as a counsellor helping other addicts.
examples.chinese: 加里曾经是个吸毒者，现在他当起了顾问，帮助其他的吸毒者。

examples.english: It is a dangerous part of town - there are thieves and junkies everywhere.
examples.chinese: 城里的这一带很危险—到处都有窃贼和吸毒的人。

examples.english: The toilets are often used by junkies who leave their needles lying around on the floor.
examples.chinese: 这些洗手间经常有吸毒者使用，地上到处都有他们留下的针头。

centers.english: when a drug or other substance makes people addicted
centers.chinese: 毒品或其他物品使人上瘾

examples.english: Most addictive drugs are illegal.
examples.chinese: 大多数使人上瘾的药物都是不合法的。

examples.english: Humphrey claims that the tobacco industry hid evidence that cigarettes were addictive.
examples.chinese: 汉弗莱声称，烟草行业隐瞒了香烟使人上瘾的证据。

examples.english: Crack is a highly addictive form of cocaine.
examples.chinese: 强效可卡因是一种非常容易上瘾的可卡因。

examples.english: The caffeine in coffee is mildly addictive.
examples.chinese: 咖啡中所含的咖啡因能使人轻微上瘾。

centers.english: the need to have a drug etc regularly
centers.chinese: 定期使用药物等的需要

examples.english: Drug addiction is now the biggest social problem in American cities.
examples.chinese: 吸毒是当今美国城市最大的社会问题。

examples.english: Eventually she managed to overcome her addiction to alcohol.
examples.chinese: 最后她终于戒除了酒瘾。

examples.english: His cocaine habit was ruining his life.
examples.chinese: 他的可卡因瘾正在毁掉他的一生。

examples.english: Some smokers use chewing gum containing nicotine to help them kick the habit.
examples.chinese: 有些吸烟的人用含有尼古丁的口香糖来帮助戒烟。

examples.english: Dependence on alcohol can have a serious effect on your relationships and career.
examples.chinese: 喝酒成瘾会严重影响你的人际关系和事业。

examples.english: The clinic treats people affected by drug dependence.
examples.chinese: 这家诊所治疗对药物产生依赖性的人。

centers.english: to smoke a cigarette, pipe etc

examples.english: How old were you when you started smoking?
examples.chinese: 你几岁的时候开始抽烟的？

examples.english: Do you mind if I smoke?
examples.chinese: 我可以抽烟吗?

examples.english: He sat behind his desk, smoking a fat cigar.
examples.chinese: 他坐在他的办公桌旁，抽着一支粗粗的雪茄。

examples.english: Sue never smoked a cigarette in her life, yet she still got lung cancer.
examples.chinese: 休一生没有抽过一支烟，但还是得了肺癌。

examples.english: Anyone who smokes 40 a day can expect to have a lot of health problems.
examples.chinese: 任何人一天要是抽40支烟会出现许多健康问题。

examples.english: Some teenage girls think that smoking helps keep their weight down.
examples.chinese: 有些十几岁的女孩认为抽烟可以帮助减肥。

examples.english: Smoking is not allowed in any part of the building.
examples.chinese: 这大楼里任何地方都不准吸烟。

examples.english: These days smoking is seen as an anti-social habit.
examples.chinese: 如今吸烟被看成是反社会行为。

examples.english: Roy believed his illness was caused by passive smoking.
examples.chinese: 罗伊认为他的病是由被动吸烟引起的。

examples.english: He lit a cigar and puffed on it thoughtfully.
examples.chinese: 他点起一根雪茄，若有所思地抽着。

examples.english: They drove in silence, Charlie contentedly puffing on his pipe.
examples.chinese: 他们默默地开着车，查利心满意足地抽着烟斗。

examples.english: She lit her last cigarette, and drew on it slowly.
examples.chinese: 她点起最后一支烟，慢慢地吸着。

examples.english: When we were students, we all used to smoke a lot.
examples.chinese: 我们读书的时候都抽很多烟。

examples.english: This disease is more common in people who smoke heavily.
examples.chinese: 这种疾病在抽烟很凶的人身上很常见。

examples.english: She's only thirteen and she already smokes like a chimney.
examples.chinese: 她只有13岁，可是烟瘾已经很大了。

examples.english: James sat silently through her speech, chain-smoking.
examples.chinese: 在她发言期间，詹姆斯静静地坐着，一根接一根地抽着烟。

examples.english: Although he chain-smoked cigarettes, his hands were unstained.
examples.chinese: 虽然他一根接一根地抽烟，可是他的手没有被熏黄。

examples.english: The survey shows that most smokers would like to stop smoking.
examples.chinese: 调查显示，大多数吸烟者都想戒烟。

examples.english: The average smoker spends about £35 a week on cigarettes.
examples.chinese: 一般吸烟者平均每周花35英镑购买香烟。

examples.english: He had been a heavy smoker all his life and only stopped when his doctor told him to.
examples.chinese: 他一生都烟瘾很大，直到医生叫他戒掉他才戒了。

examples.english: I noticed that the thin, nervous man was a chain-smoker.
examples.chinese: 我发现那个神经质的瘦男人是个老烟鬼。

examples.english: He doesn't smoke or drink.
examples.chinese: 他不抽烟也不喝酒。

examples.english: ‘Cigarette?’ ‘No thanks, I don't smoke.’
examples.chinese: “抽烟吗？”“不，谢谢，我不抽烟。”

expressions.text: stop smoking/give up smoking / quit smoking/quit

examples.english: Make a list of all the benefits of stopping smoking, for example better health, fresher breath, and more money.
examples.chinese: 把戒烟的种种好处列出来，比如说身体会更健康，口气会更清新，又可以省下钱来。

examples.english: I'm trying to give up smoking, but it isn't easy.
examples.chinese: 我想戒烟，可是这不容易。

examples.english: I didn't gain any weight when I quit smoking.
examples.chinese: 我戒烟时体重没有增加。

examples.english: This part of the restaurant is reserved for non-smokers.
examples.chinese: 餐厅的这个区域留给不抽烟的人。

examples.english: Non-smokers get cheaper health insurance.
examples.chinese: 不抽烟的人买健康保险更便宜。

examples.english: There were big no-smoking signs on all the walls.
examples.chinese: 所有的墙上都挂着大大的禁烟告示牌。

examples.english: The company has a no-smoking policy in all its offices.
examples.chinese: 这家公司所有的办公室里都实行禁烟政策。

examples.english: Most restaurants and cafes have set aside small no-smoking areas.
examples.chinese: 大多数餐馆和咖啡厅都会辟出一个小小的无烟区。

examples.english: I asked for a seat in the non-smoking section of the plane.
examples.chinese: 我要了飞机上禁烟区的一个座位。

examples.english: Most workers prefer a smoke-free environment at the office.
examples.chinese: 大多数工作人员都喜欢办公室里是禁烟环境。

examples.english: We are calling for all airlines to be smoke-free.
examples.chinese: 我们在呼吁所有航空公司都禁烟。

centers.english: to light a cigarette, pipe etc

examples.english: The old man struck a match and lit his pipe.
examples.chinese: 老人划了一根火柴，点上烟斗。

examples.english: I leaned forward to light her cigarette.
examples.chinese: 我倾过身去给她点烟。

examples.english: They're not allowed to smoke at work, so they all light up as soon as they leave.
examples.chinese: 他们上班时间不许抽烟，所以一下班就都点上烟了。

examples.english: She lit up another cigarette.
examples.chinese: 她又点了一支香烟。

examples.english: Give us a light, will you?
examples.chinese: 借个火给我们好吗？

examples.english: Henry will give you a light.
examples.chinese: 亨利会给你一个火的。

expressions.text: have you got a light? /do you have a light

examples.english: Excuse me, do you have a light?
examples.chinese: 对不起，你有火吗？

centers.english: to make a cigarette, pipe etc stop burning

examples.english: Bill put out his pipe and stood up to leave.
examples.chinese: 比尔熄灭烟斗起身离开。

examples.english: Put that cigarette out at once!
examples.chinese: 马上把烟灭了！

examples.english: Passengers are requested to extinguish all cigarettes when the red light goes on.
examples.chinese: 红灯亮起时，请乘客熄灭所有香烟。

examples.english: She nervously stubbed out her cigarette, and immediately lit another one.
examples.chinese: 她紧张地掐灭香烟，随即又点起一支。

examples.english: He smoked three cigarettes and stubbed them out in his saucer.
examples.chinese: 他抽了三支烟，并在碟子里掐灭。

examples.english: I'm just too tired to cook after work.
examples.chinese: 下班后我太累了，不想做饭。

examples.english: Prick the potatoes with a fork before cooking them.
examples.chinese: 烹饪前先用叉子叉一下马铃薯。

examples.english: I usually cook a big meal on Sundays.
examples.chinese: 星期天我通常都要做一顿大餐。

examples.english: The last time she cooked a meal for us we really enjoyed it.
examples.chinese: 上次她亲自下厨，我们吃得很开心。

examples.english: Mix the vegetables with the cooked rice.
examples.chinese: 把蔬菜和煮熟的米饭拌在一起。

examples.english: Is the pasta cooked yet?
examples.chinese: 意大利面煮好了吗？

examples.english: My mother used to make delicious strawberry jam.
examples.chinese: 以前，我母亲常做好吃的草莓酱。

examples.english: I think I'll make fish pie for supper.
examples.chinese: 我想晚餐我来做鱼馅饼。

examples.english: I'll make the salad if you'll make the pasta.
examples.chinese: 你做意大利面的话，我就做沙拉。

examples.english: When I got home, Martin was in the kitchen making lunch.
examples.chinese: 我回到家时，马丁正在厨房做午餐。

examples.english: I'll make you some sandwiches to take with you.
examples.chinese: 我会给你做些三明治让你带上。

examples.english: Sit down and let me get dinner.
examples.chinese: 请坐，我来准备饭菜。

examples.english: Joey was downstairs getting the kids their breakfast.
examples.chinese: 乔伊在楼下给孩子们准备早餐。

examples.english: I have to fix lunch now.
examples.chinese: 现在我得准备午饭了。

examples.english: If you're hungry, I can fix you some scrambled eggs.
examples.chinese: 要是你饿的话，我给你做个炒鸡蛋。

examples.english: She managed to rustle up a delicious meal with just a little salad and some eggs.
examples.chinese: 她只用了一点儿沙拉和几个鸡蛋，就迅速做成了一顿美餐。

examples.english: ‘I don't think there's any food in the house.’ ‘Don't worry, I'm sure we can rustle something up.’
examples.chinese: “我觉得家里没有食物了。”“别担心，我肯定我们能很快做点东西来吃。

examples.english: Prepare a vinaigrette dressing with olive oil, white wine vinegar, and mustard.
examples.chinese: 用橄榄油、白葡萄酒醋和芥子酱做一份醋油调料。

examples.english: Some French dishes take hours to prepare.
examples.chinese: 有些法国菜要花好几个小时才能做成。

examples.english: Mrs Fujimoto prepared a delicious meal for them.
examples.chinese: 藤本太太为他们准备了一顿美餐。

examples.english: I was thinking of doing fish tonight.
examples.chinese: 今晚我想做一道鱼。

examples.english: I could do you an omelette.
examples.chinese: 我能给你做份煎蛋饼。

examples.english: For the party, they had concocted a special cocktail containing, among other things, rum and vodka.
examples.chinese: 为了这次聚会，他们用朗姆酒、伏特加酒和其他东西调制了一种特殊的鸡尾酒。

examples.english: Whenever I had a cold, my grandmother would concoct a remedy out of herbs, ginger, lemons and garlic.
examples.chinese: 我一感冒，祖母就会用药草、生姜、柠檬和蒜调制汤药。

examples.english: In the glass was a greenish concoction with pieces of ice and fruit floating in it.
examples.chinese: 玻璃杯里有一种略带绿色的混合饮料，上面漂浮着冰和水果。

examples.english: If they sell cocktails would you ask the bartender to mix a Harvey Wallbanger?
examples.chinese: 如果他们卖鸡尾酒，你叫酒保调一杯“伏特加橙汁鸡尾酒”好吗?

examples.english: You can leave the meal cooking while you mix a drink for your guests.
examples.chinese: 菜在灶上烧的时候，你可以为客人调饮料。

examples.english: Can we put the dinner on? I'm starved.
examples.chinese: 开始做晚饭好吗？我饿了。〔

examples.english: They'll be here soon. You'd better put the steaks on.
examples.chinese: 他们很快就会到了。你最好开始做牛排。

examples.english: The soup is on, so dinner will be ready in about twenty minutes.
examples.chinese: 汤正在煮，晚饭大约20分钟后就准备好了。

examples.english: Okay, the chicken is on. What can I do now?
examples.chinese: 好的，鸡已经上灶了。我现在做什么？

examples.english: In a large sauté pan, cook the bacon until crisp.
examples.chinese: 用一只大煎锅将熏猪肉煎脆。

examples.english: Cover and cook slowly until beets are tender, stirring occasionally.
examples.chinese: 盖上锅盖将甜菜慢慢煮软，偶尔翻炒一下。

examples.english: Boil the potatoes until they are soft.
examples.chinese: 将马铃薯放入水中煮软。

examples.english: The beans should be boiled rapidly for at least twenty minutes.
examples.chinese: 豆子应当快煮至少20分钟。

examples.english: boiled eggs
examples.chinese: 白煮蛋

examples.english: Simmer the macaroni in lightly salted water.
examples.chinese: 在淡盐水中慢慢煨通心粉。

examples.english: Cover the pan and let it simmer for fifteen minutes.
examples.chinese: 盖上锅盖煨15分钟。

examples.english: Combine all ingredients and simmer gently for 30 to 45 minutes.
examples.chinese: 把所有的配料搀和在一起，慢慢地炖上30至45分钟。

examples.english: Fry the onions gently for five minutes.
examples.chinese: 将洋葱嫩煎五分钟。

examples.english: Mushrooms are best when fried in olive oil.
examples.chinese: 蘑菇用橄榄油炒最好。

examples.english: the smell of fried bacon
examples.chinese: 煎培根肉的气味

examples.english: Add the garlic, ginger and onions and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
examples.chinese: 加入大蒜、生姜、洋葱炒30秒。

examples.english: Water chestnuts can be eaten straight from the tin or stir-fried.
examples.chinese: 荸荠开罐即食或炒后食用均可。

examples.english: Chinese peanut oils are perfect for stir-frying.
examples.chinese: 中国花生油非常适合爆炒。

examples.english: My grandmother baked her own bread.
examples.chinese: 我祖母自己烘烤面包。

examples.english: Bake at 190C for 20-25 minutes.
examples.chinese: 以摄氏190度烘烤20至25分钟。

examples.english: Bake the soufflés for 12 minutes.
examples.chinese: 将蛋奶酥烘烤12分钟。

examples.english: Place on a baking sheet and bake in a very low oven until crisp.
examples.chinese: 放在烤板上低温烘烤至脆。

examples.english: I love baked potatoes with cheese and broccoli.
examples.chinese: 我爱吃烤马铃薯配乳酪和花椰菜。

examples.english: Roast the chicken for three hours in a hot oven.
examples.chinese: 把鸡肉放进火炉烤三小时。

examples.english: the smell of roasting meat
examples.chinese: 烤肉的气味

examples.english: There's some cold roast beef in the fridge.
examples.chinese: 冰箱里有些冷的烤牛肉。

examples.english: Grill the steak for about five minutes on each side.
examples.chinese: 将牛排每一面烤五分钟左右。

examples.english: Brush the kebabs lightly with oil and broil them.
examples.chinese: 将肉串刷少许油后烧烤。

examples.english: Broil until cheese melts and edges of bread are crusty.
examples.chinese: 烤至乳酪融化，面包的边角发脆。

examples.english: I like grilled sole.
examples.chinese: 我爱吃烤鳎鱼。

examples.english: I ordered broiled steak, French fries and salad.
examples.chinese: 我点了烤牛排、炸薯条和沙拉。

examples.english: Steam the courgettes for 3-4 minutes.
examples.chinese: 将小胡瓜蒸三四分钟。

examples.english: The broccoli, peppers and squash should be steamed.
examples.chinese: 花椰菜、青椒和南瓜应当蒸熟。

examples.english: a steamed pudding
examples.chinese: 一个蒸制布丁

examples.english: Sushi consists of raw fish and rice.
examples.chinese: 寿司是由生鱼和米饭做成的。

examples.english: a salad made with nuts, raisins and raw carrots
examples.chinese: 用坚果、葡萄干和生胡萝卜做的沙拉

examples.english: If you can't resist snacking between meals, eat something healthy such as fruit or raw vegetables.
examples.chinese: 如果两餐之间一定要吃点心，就吃些水果、生蔬菜等健康食品。

examples.english: Uncooked meat should be stored separately.
examples.chinese: 生肉必须另外保存。

examples.english: Spoon the sauce into large uncooked pasta shells.
examples.chinese: 将调味汁舀进大个的生贝壳状意大利面里。

examples.english: It can be dangerous to eat undercooked pork.
examples.chinese: 食用未经煮透的猪肉可能有危险。

examples.english: The potatoes were underdone.
examples.chinese: 马铃薯未煮透。

examples.english: The poultry wasn't cooked and the fish was practically raw.
examples.chinese: 家禽肉没煮透，鱼差不多是生的。

examples.english: The steak's a little overdone.
examples.chinese: 牛排有点煮过头了。

examples.english: I hate overcooked vegetables.
examples.chinese: 我不喜欢吃烧过头的蔬菜。

examples.english: Oh, no! I've burnt the chicken!
examples.chinese: 哦，不！我把鸡肉烧糊了。

examples.english: The muffins are a little burned on the bottom.
examples.chinese: 松饼底部有点焦。

examples.english: the smell of burnt hamburger
examples.chinese: 汉堡牛肉饼烧焦的气味

examples.english: His hobbies include cooking and wine-making.
examples.chinese: 他的嗜好有烹饪和酿酒。

examples.english: Who does the cooking in your house?
examples.chinese: 你们家谁做饭？

examples.english: My favourite subject at school was cookery.
examples.chinese: 我上学时最喜欢烹饪课。

examples.english: Ken Lowery, a cookery expert, will be giving free demonstrations from 4.30 until 7.00.
examples.chinese: 4点30分到7点，厨艺大师肯·洛厄里将为大家免费演示。

examples.english: She studied at a vegetarian cookery school in London.
examples.chinese: 她在伦敦一家素食烹饪学校上学。

examples.english: I can recommend that new Greek restaurant. Their cooking is excellent.
examples.chinese: 我可以向您推荐那家新开的希腊餐馆。他们的烹调是一流的。

examples.english: Stop criticizing my cooking!
examples.chinese: 别对我的厨艺说三道四！

examples.english: Karen loves Italian cooking.
examples.chinese: 卡伦喜欢吃意大利菜。

examples.english: Maybe you should take a Chinese cooking class.
examples.chinese: 也许你应该去上中餐烹饪课。

examples.english: There's nothing like home cooking.
examples.chinese: 没有比家里做的菜更好吃的了。

examples.english: Annatto is a small seed used in Latin American cookery.
examples.chinese: 胭脂树籽是拉美菜系中用的一种小种子。

examples.english: Puddings are a great speciality of British cookery.
examples.chinese: 布丁是英式菜肴的一大特色。

examples.english: Hungary has an excellent and internationally recognised cuisine.
examples.chinese: 匈牙利有举世公认的美食。

examples.english: Trompe Le Monde features classic French cuisine served amid sumptuous surroundings.
examples.chinese: “愚弄世界”餐厅布置豪华，以法式经典菜肴为特色。

examples.english: Venetian cuisine is based on seafood and rice.
examples.chinese: 威尼斯菜以海鲜和米饭为主。

examples.english: I'm not a great cook, but I can follow a recipe pretty well.
examples.chinese: 我不是大厨，但我能按照食谱依葫芦画瓢。

examples.english: rabbit pie made to a traditional country recipe
examples.chinese: 按传统乡村做法制作的兔肉馅饼

examples.english: Could you give me the recipe for that chocolate cake?
examples.chinese: 你能告诉我那种巧克力蛋糕是怎么做的吗？

examples.english: Peters is the author of the popular cookbook ‘Doing it in the Kitchen’.
examples.chinese: 彼得斯是畅销烹饪书《动手下厨》的作者。

examples.english: an illustrated cookbook
examples.chinese: 一本图解食谱

examples.english: We have several French cookbooks in stock.
examples.chinese: 我们店有几本法式烹饪书的现货。

centers.english: something that is used in cooking

examples.english: We keep all the cooking utensils on the bottom shelf.
examples.chinese: 我们把所有的炊具都放在架子底层。

examples.english: That's cooking chocolate -- you shouldn't really eat it on its own.
examples.chinese: 那是烹调用的巧克力——你不应该就这样吃。

examples.english: Mint is perhaps the best-known of culinary herbs.
examples.chinese: 薄荷可能是最出名的烹饪用的香草。

examples.english: The use of garlic, whether for medicinal or culinary purposes, dates back several centuries.
examples.chinese: 大蒜的使用，无论是用于医学目的还是烹任目的，都可上溯至几个世纪以前。

examples.english: Jane used to work as a cook in an Italian restaurant.
examples.chinese: 简过去在一家意大利餐厅当厨师。

examples.english: Frank's a very good cook.
examples.chinese: 弗兰克是一名优秀的厨师。

examples.english: Marco's ambition had been to become a chef in one of the big hotels.
examples.chinese: 马科的梦想是在一家大酒店里当厨师。

examples.english: Sagin is a 31-year-old French chef living and working in Montreal.
examples.chinese: 萨吉恩是一名31岁的法国厨师，在蒙特利尔生活、工作。

examples.english: Thank you, that was a delicious meal.
examples.chinese: 谢谢，这顿饭很可口。

examples.english: The apple pie is delicious with vanilla ice cream.
examples.chinese: 这苹果馅饼和香草冰淇淋一起吃味道很好。

examples.english: Mmm. This wine is delicious.
examples.chinese: 嗯，这酒好喝。

examples.english: These sausages are really tasty - where did you buy them?
examples.chinese: 这些香肠真好吃——你是哪儿买的？

examples.english: She makes a really tasty dish with chicken and rice.
examples.chinese: 她用鸡肉和米饭做了一道极美味的菜。

examples.english: This is a really good pizza. I think I'll have another slice.
examples.chinese: 这比萨饼真好吃，我想再吃一块。

examples.english: That's good coffee - are you sure it's decaffeinated?
examples.chinese: 那咖啡真好喝。你肯定它是去咖啡因的吗？

examples.english: You can get some very nice bread at Walker's bakery.
examples.chinese: 在沃克面包店你可以买到很好的面包。

examples.english: The vegetables tasted surprisingly good.
examples.chinese: 这些蔬菜味道出奇地好。

examples.english: This casserole tastes nice. How did you make it?
examples.chinese: 这炖锅菜味道很好，你是怎么做的？

examples.english: Everyone has the capability of making themselves something good to eat when they get home in the evening.
examples.chinese: 晚上回到家，人人都能为自己做些好吃的。

examples.english: I like my steaks to be tender, juicy, and full of flavour.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢牛排鲜嫩多汁，而且口味要浓。

examples.english: As a starter, we had delicious juicy tomatoes stuffed with rice.
examples.chinese: 我们第一道菜吃了一个美味多汁的番茄酿饭。

examples.english: This part of the country is famous for its fine wines and succulent peaches.
examples.chinese: 该国的这一地区以美酒和味甘汁多的桃子著称。

examples.english: The chicken was golden and crispy on the outside and juicy and succulent inside.
examples.chinese: 这鸡外面金黄松脆，里面汁多味美。

centers.chinese: 看起来或闻起来美味可口的

examples.english: An appetizing smell of baked apples filled the house.
examples.chinese: 屋子里弥漫着令人馋涎欲滴的烤苹果的香味。

examples.english: The soup didn't look very appetizing but it tasted delicious.
examples.chinese: 这汤看起来不是很刺激食欲，但尝起来味道很好。

examples.english: The average hospital serves meals that are neither appetizing nor nutritious.
examples.chinese: 一般医院提供的饭菜都是既不美味又缺乏营养的。

examples.english: The chocolate cake was tempting but I couldn't have any because of my diet.
examples.chinese: 那巧克力蛋糕很诱人，但我在节食，所以一点都不能吃。

examples.english: Contained in the pages of the book are tempting recipes from around the world.
examples.chinese: 这本书中收入了世界各地诱人的菜谱。

examples.english: The waitress came round with a tray of mouth-watering cream cakes.
examples.chinese: 女服务员端来了一盘令人垂涎的奶油蛋糕。

examples.english: The delicatessen sells a mouth-watering variety of cooked meats and cheeses.
examples.chinese: 这家熟食店出售各种美味的熟肉和乳酪。

examples.english: The thought of bacon and eggs made her mouth water.
examples.chinese: 她一想到培根煎蛋就要流口水。
